# BrainWise Build Queue

## Open Queue — Session 107 (authoritative live list)

This is the single authoritative list of open work as of Session 107. It supersedes reconstructing the queue from per-session carryforward bullets. Built from the Session 107 triage of the full historical queue + the Group A–E scope-doc verification. Tiers are priority groupings, not strict sequence.

> **ACTIVE NEAR-TERM QUEUE (added Session 127, updated Session 128):** The current active backlog is the 12-item list in the **v135 entry below**. **Items 3, 9, 10 completed Session 128** (all frontend-only, GitHub-SHA-verified). Items 2, 5, 12 were RECON/READOUT only in Session 128 (not shipped) and now carry Cole's Session-129 build decisions inline. **Item 1 (super-admin organization management) COMPLETED Session 129 — see the v137 entry below (consolidated CompanyDetail Members/Departments/Invitations tabs + sidebar consolidation; backend admin_assign_or_invite_org_admin, supervisor_dashboard_set SA-branch, invitation_send v22, admin_invitation_revoke). **Items 2 (+10/25 AI-chat credits, Phases A+B), 12 (lesson-block editor surfaced as "Lesson Builder", Option C), and 8 (super-admin learning report — full backend + cert-path data cleanup + dashboard) COMPLETED Session 130 — see the v138 entry below.** Remaining active-backlog items still open: 4, 5, 6, 7, 11.** **Sessions 131 + 132 were a platform-wide edge-function bug-fix arc (the "Conflicting API keys" gateway bug; 15 functions fixed, full sweep clean — see the v139 entry below) and shipped no backlog-feature work; the content-authoring restructure / content-item viewer (scope docs `scope-content-authoring-restructure.md` + `content-item-viewer-scope.md`) was the intended Session-131 work, was displaced by the bug, and remains the next feature target.** The Session-107 tiers in this section remain historical reference, not the live queue.

> **SESSION 137 DELTA (Learning-Experience / white-label arc).** Track 1 (AI lesson authoring + Pexels image pipeline) FULLY FIXED + confirmed working end to end: `lesson-ingest-pexels-asset` v2 root-cause fix (item_type guard was `!== "lesson"`, rejected all real lessons which are `lesson_blocks`; now `!== "lesson_blocks"`), `ai-authoring-chat` v14 (images-supported system-prompt section), and the canvas asset-map refresh leftover (parent calls `registerNewAssetId` per built block in onBuildLesson + threads into AiPane). Track 2 (per-lesson branding / white-label) Phases 1–3 SHIPPED: P1 data layer (`lesson_brands` table + `upsert_lesson_brand` full-object RPC + public `lesson-branding` bucket, all verified), P2 cover page + brand editor + topic ToC (`LessonTitleCard.tsx`, `LessonBrandPanel.tsx`, `lessonToc.ts`; learner sidebar ToC switched to heading topics), P3 per-block hex pickers (`BrandColorSwatch` gained `allowCustomHex`, tints palette auto-softens custom hex). Phase 4a partial: `scaffold-lesson-outline` v24 now returns `{overview, outline}` and writes overview to `content_items.description`. **OPEN (Session 138 completes Phase 4 then Tracks 3–6):** 4a-remainder = `expand-lesson-from-outline` color-policy flip (fetch brand server-side, emit on-brand tinted bg + saturated design-element colors instead of forcing null, LOOSEN the fixed-`BRAND_COLORS` validation to accept the lesson's brand hexes; DELICATE — guards the core build path, 49KB dashboard-paste, rolled-back build test required); 4b = `ai-authoring-chat` brand intake (propose brand from typed guidelines, apply via `upsert_lesson_brand`); 4c = AI rebrand of existing lesson (re-theme stored block colors from new brand without rewriting content). Then Tracks 3 (ElevenLabs voiceover), 4 (Synthesia video), 5 (learner AI tutor), 6 (visual shell). Scope doc: `BrainWise_Learning_Experience_and_WhiteLabel_Scope_v1.md`. Full handoff: `session-137-to-138.md`. **Standing facts:** lessons are `content_items` item_type `lesson_blocks` (not 'lesson'); MCP `deploy_edge_function` truncates inline payloads ~25KB+ (expand/scaffold are dashboard-paste; a truncated bundle fails build and leaves prior version intact); `upsert_lesson_brand` is a FULL-object upsert (send complete brand state, null clears to default).

> **SESSION 139 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 1 COMPLETE).** All frontend, no backend, no new block types; all files SHA-verified at HEAD `3a0a670`. Shipped: **VIS-1** numbered section bands (navy-tint + orange rule + "~N min" chip; replaces the leading heading per section, degrades to number+time when a section has no heading); **VIS-2** progress indicators (TOC header progress bar + "X/Y" + per-entry done/active/todo markers; section complete = visited AND all gating-required blocks complete); **VIS-5** animated paced reveal (`bw-section-enter` 280ms fade+rise on each Continue, `prefers-reduced-motion` guarded); **VIS-7** brand-aware pull-quote (`.bw-pullquote`); **VIS-8** brand display/body fonts inside blocks. Plus a **hooks-order crash fix** (React #310 on the rebuilt 42-block lesson: the `tocEntries`/`activeTopicId` useMemos sat after the loading/error early returns in `LessonBlockViewer.tsx`; moved above the guards, reinforces the §137 hooks-order convention) and the **per-lesson brand-variable layer** (see architecture-reference v140). **DURABLE: the render-time brand layer is the new home for all lesson-block theming.** Viewer (`LessonBlockViewer.tsx`) and editor (`LessonBlocksEditor.tsx`) read `lesson_brands` and set CSS vars on their wrappers (`--lesson-primary/cta/accent/surface` from the brand colors, `--font-display` + body `fontFamily` from the brand fonts); the block CSS (`lesson-blocks.css`) and `BlockRenderer.tsx` consume those vars instead of literal brand hexes. Semantic/status colors (forest `#2D6A4F`, red `#D62828`, amber `#FFB703`, gray `#6D6875`, white) and the WCAG `readableTextColorForBg` contrast helper stay fixed by design. Two shared extractions: `lessonEstimate.ts` (`BLOCK_MINUTE_WEIGHTS` + `estimateMinutes`) and `lessonFonts.ts` (`FONT_MAP` + `resolveFont`), both pulled out of `LessonTitleCard` and re-imported by it. Also confirmed live this session: `scaffold-lesson-outline` v26 (`{overview, outcomes, outline}`), TP-1 navy-hero cover + spiral mark, TP-2 outcomes wired in viewer + editor, and a fresh replace-mode build of the test lesson exercising color + outcomes + section bands + paced reveal + interactivity. **NEXT (Phase 2):** INT-1 (AI open-response feedback block + feedback edge fn), VIS-3 (hero imagery, reuse `lesson-ingest-pexels-asset` v2), VIS-6 (end-of-lesson recap). Full handoff: `session-139-to-140.md`.

Pending Cole-side: INT-1 in-app end-to-end test (first live Opus round-trip) + AI-authoring functional check. **NEXT (Phase 2 remaining):** VIS-3 (hero imagery, reuse `lesson-ingest-pexels-asset` v2) with options to be RE-PRESENTED for a decision before any build, then VIS-6 (end-of-lesson recap). Full handoff: `session-140-to-141.md`.
> **SESSION 141 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 2 COMPLETE).** All frontend, no backend, no new block type, no migration; verified at main commit `fa9e2f7f`. **VIS-3** shipped as a brand-textured cover + branded section bands, NOT a stock-photo hero (Cole rejected stock imagery for cheapness/dating risk and to avoid the private-bucket/signing fork that reusing `lesson-ingest-pexels-asset` for a public cover would force): the cover hero band (`LessonTitleCard.tsx`, shared by viewer + editor preview) now paints a dark-anchored diagonal gradient on `var(--cover-primary)` (color-mix toward #000 ~18%) under a radial `--cover-accent` glow, plus a faint BrainWise spiral watermark (opacity 0.06) behind a `relative z-10` content wrapper; white text kept (dark-anchored = legible on any brand). The viewer section band (`LessonBlockViewer.tsx`) swapped its literal `rgba(2,31,54,0.06)` navy tint for a soft color-mix gradient of `--lesson-primary` toward `--lesson-surface` (9%->4%), rule + numbered badge on `--lesson-cta`. The four remaining global `--bw-orange` viewer elements (TOC progress bar, TOC active dot, Continue button, Complete-lesson button) moved to `--lesson-cta`; the mobile TOC `SheetContent` got `style={lessonBrandVars}` because the Radix portal escapes the brand-var wrapper. `--bw-orange` is now fully gone from the viewer; `--bw-forest` semantics kept. Everything derives from existing `lesson_brands` slots via the v140 brand-var layer, so zero schema/RPC change. **VIS-6** shipped as a static end-of-lesson recap + inline completion card + section reward pill, all in `LessonBlockViewer.tsx`, zero backend: the lesson-level finish had NO completion moment (the `ContentItemViewer` cascade modal only fires at module/curriculum/certification tiers), so the old quiet "Lesson complete." banner became a completion CARD (forest header, "You finished {title}", a recap list from `content_items.outcomes` else heading topics, stat chips for sections/checks/minutes), plus a forest "Section complete" pill in each section footer (footer placement + the fact that clearing the last gating-required block is what completes a section means one pill covers BOTH the section-completion and gated-block-clearance triggers without per-block toast noise). The AI recap path (the VIS-6 "optional AI" option) was deferred to the Track 5 learner-tutor arc. **Phase 2 COMPLETE (INT-1 S140 + VIS-3 + VIS-6 S141).** NEXT (Phase 3): INT-3 hotspot, INT-4 reveal, INT-5 sequence, INT-8 activation poll, each a NEW block type so §61 5-surface parity is MANDATORY per type. Full handoff: `session-141-to-142.md`.

> **SESSION 142 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 3 — INT-3 hotspot SHIPPED).** The `hotspot` interactive block (a labeled image with 2-12 clickable markers that reveal short notes on click) is live end to end with full §61 5-surface parity. **STATELESS by design** (no table, no RPC for the block itself): completion rides the existing sticky `upsert_lesson_block_progress` path (all markers opened in-session completes; an empty-hotspots block auto-completes). Config schema is FLAT, matching the image block: `{ asset_id, alt, attribution, instructions, hotspots:[{client_id, x(0-100%), y(0-100%), label, content(TipTap)}], gating_required, background_color, padding }`. **Backend (3 migrations, verified):** `lesson_block_types` row (`hotspot`, interactive, not scored, v1-active); `_walk_block_config_for_asset_refs` extended so the single image asset tracks as `ref_field 'hotspot_asset'` (covers ref-tracking + editor signing + trainee signing via the 3 asset RPCs); rate-limit table `lesson_hotspot_autoplace_log` (RLS on, REVOKE authenticated/anon). **New vision edge fn `lesson-hotspot-autoplace` v1** (verify_jwt TRUE, super-admin + impersonation-gated, 10/hr): downloads the resolved image, sends ONE Opus vision call (`claude-opus-4-7`), returns `{client_id,x,y}` placements clamped 0-100, for the "Auto-place with AI" button. **Frontend (2 Lovable prompts, SHA-verified at main `d6c9c695`):** prompt 1 = `blockTypeMeta.ts` (Target icon) + new `HotspotBlockForm.tsx` (click-to-place canvas, reused Pexels+upload picker, numbered markers) + `BlockEditorPane.tsx` + `BlockRenderer.tsx` (Popover reveal, all hooks before early return per §137, trainee-gated completion) + `lesson-blocks.css`; prompt 2 = the "Auto-place with AI" button (`runAutoPlace` -> `lesson-hotspot-autoplace`) + `Stage2Outline.tsx`/`AiPane.tsx` broadened so hotspot is image-bearing at outline review and rides the SAME `image_resolved` stitch path as the image block. **§61 parity:** `draft-lesson-block` v17, `scaffold-lesson-outline` v28, `expand-lesson-from-outline` v29 (all dashboard-paste, boot-probed OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401). **DESIGN LOCK (durable):** text generators emit hotspot label + content with PLACEHOLDER marker coords (even x-spread, staggered y), NOT image-accurate; accurate placement comes only from the vision auto-place button or manual drag. **SUPERSEDED:** an earlier "generators emit `image_query`" plan was dropped after reading the code; images resolve at the OUTLINE stage in `AiPane` and stitch `asset_id`+`attribution` onto the block, so hotspot reuses that path (no `image_query` field exists). Pending Cole-side (non-blocking): live hotspot end-to-end test (build via chat, auto-place, trainee completion) + the carried INT-1 in-app test. **NEXT (Phase 3 remaining):** INT-4 click-to-reveal, INT-5 drag-to-order, INT-8 activation poll, each a NEW block type so §61 5-surface parity stays MANDATORY. Full handoff: `session-142-to-143.md`.

> **SESSION 143 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 3 — INT-4 reveal_cards SHIPPED).** The `reveal_cards` interactive block (a responsive GRID of click-to-flip two-face cards) is live end to end with full §61 5-surface parity. The learner clicks a card to flip it (3D flip) from its front to its back; revealing every card completes the block. **STATELESS by design** (no table, no block-specific RPC): completion rides the existing sticky `upsert_lesson_block_progress` path (all cards revealed in-session completes; an empty `items` block auto-completes; `gating_required` defaults false). Icon `Eye`. Each card has a TipTap front + optional front image + optional caption and a TipTap back, and **front AND back are independently brandable** (`front_color`/`back_color`, brand hexes, text contrast auto-derived via the existing `readableTextColorForBg`). DESIGN LOCK (durable): this is a quick reveal GRID, deliberately NOT flashcards (the one-at-a-time recall carousel with Got it/Review again self-rating) and NOT an accordion (titled long-form reference sections); chosen as a distinct type for risk isolation. Config schema is FLAT, array key `items`, and the per-card image field name `front_image_asset_id` MATCHES the live flashcards block: `{ instructions, items:[{client_id, front(TipTap), front_image_asset_id(uuid|null), front_caption?, back(TipTap), front_color?, back_color?}], gating_required, background_color, padding }`. The per-card image follows the FLASHCARDS pattern (author uploads post-generation; NO AiPane image-resolution or vision change). **Backend (2 migrations, each verified by a separate execute_sql):** (1) `seed_reveal_cards_lesson_block_type` = `lesson_block_types` row `reveal_cards` (interactive, not scored, v1-active); (2) `add_reveal_cards_to_asset_ref_walker` = CREATE OR REPLACE `_walk_block_config_for_asset_refs` adding the `items[]`/`front_image_asset_id` branch (the one walker all three asset RPCs route through, so it covers ref-tracking + editor signing + trainee signing). No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 reaffirmed). Cole will run a full smoke test of ALL lesson-block changes at once next session; **Phase 3 remaining: INT-5 drag-to-order, INT-8 activation poll.** Full handoff: `session-143-to-144.md`.

> **SESSION 144 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 3 — INT-5 sequence SHIPPED; INT-8 poll QUEUED with design).** The `sequence` interactive block (drag 2-8 items into the correct order) is live end to end with full §61 5-surface parity. **STATELESS by design** (no table, no block-specific RPC): completion rides the existing sticky `upsert_lesson_block_progress` path, card_sort-style — it completes the moment the learner reaches the correct order (the completion effect fires on the isCorrect false->true transition, even before pressing "Check my answers"); the "Check my answers" button paints each row green/red against its correct position; retries unlimited; `gating_required` defaults false. Authored array order = correct order; trainee sees the list shuffled (with a guard re-swapping a degenerate already-correct shuffle). dnd-kit vertical sortable. Each item carries a TipTap text + an OPTIONAL per-item image (`image_query` Pexels phrase + `image_asset_id` + `caption`). Config schema FLAT: `{ instructions, items:[{client_id, text, image_query, image_asset_id, caption}], gating_required, background_color, padding }`. Icon `ArrowUpDown`. **Backend (2 migrations, each verified by a separate execute_sql):** `seed_sequence_lesson_block_type` (`lesson_block_types` row, interactive/not-scored/v1-active) and `add_sequence_to_asset_ref_walker` (the `sequence` items[]/image_asset_id branch on `_walk_block_config_for_asset_refs`, the one walker all three asset RPCs route through). NOTIFY pgrst run. No new table, no new edge fn. **AUTO-PEXELS RESOLVER (durable, Option A — build-time only):** unlike reveal_cards/hotspot, sequence per-item images auto-resolve at FULL-LESSON build. `AiPane.tsx` `resolveSequenceImages` (invoked in `buildNextBatch`) walks each built sequence block's items, and for each non-empty `image_query` calls `newsletter-image-search` then `lesson-ingest-pexels-asset`, sets `image_asset_id`, and registers the asset. The draft "Refine with AI" single-block path has NO resolver (there `image_query` is a stored hint; the author uses the form's Pexels picker — intentional asymmetry). **§61 parity (all three dashboard-paste, reproduced full from get_edge_function, esbuild-clean, verify_jwt FALSE, boot-probed OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401 this session):** `draft-lesson-block` v19, `scaffold-lesson-outline` v30, `expand-lesson-from-outline` v31 (AI emits per-item `image_query` + `image_asset_id` null; never reorders away from the correct order). **Frontend (Lovable, SHA-verified at HEAD):** NEW `block-forms/SequenceBlockForm.tsx` (blob `907a6270`; dnd-kit vertical, per-item Pexels/upload picker, caption, gating Switch; emit spreads `...value` first so block-level bg/padding survive), `BlockRenderer.tsx` (blob `06dd161c`; `case "sequence"` -> SequenceRender + SequenceSortableRow, all hooks before the early return per §137, trainee shuffle + completion on correct order, urlMap signing), `blockTypeMeta.ts` (ArrowUpDown + union + meta + in-scope), `BlockEditorPane.tsx` (dispatch), `ai-pane/AiPane.tsx` (resolveSequenceImages), `lesson-blocks.css` (`.bw-sequence-*`). ai-authoring-chat exempt. **INT-8 activation poll — DEFERRED TO QUEUE (Cole's call) with design locked so it is not re-litigated:** make it a **block-level `poll` block type** (not a cover feature; reuses §61 machinery; place as the first block for activation, or mid-lesson). Two build options on response storage — (FULL, recommended) a new `lesson_poll_votes` table (one row per user per poll block, upsert on re-vote) + RLS (insert/update/select own only) + a SECURITY DEFINER aggregate RPC pair (`cast_poll_vote`, `get_poll_results`) revealing the per-choice distribution after voting, scoped **per-org** for multi-tenant correctness; or (LIGHTWEIGHT) vote stored in `lesson_block_progress.completion_data`, no new table, no aggregate reveal. The aggregate reveal is the activation payoff, which is why it was sequenced last and is the heaviest remaining item. Config schema: `{ question, options:[{client_id, text}], allow_revote, show_results, gating_required }` (options text-only v1, no walker change). Build plan (full): migration 1 = lesson_block_types poll row; migration 2 = lesson_poll_votes + RLS; migration 3 = cast_poll_vote + get_poll_results (REVOKE public/anon + grant authenticated, RLS functional test as a rolled-back DO block, NOTIFY pgrst); generators draft v20 / scaffold v31 / expand v32 (AI emits question + 2-8 options, never votes); frontend PollBlockForm + blockTypeMeta + BlockEditorPane dispatch + BlockRenderer case + PollRender + css, SHA-verify. **Phase 3 now clear except INT-8 (queued); next session starts Phase 4.** The combined lesson-block smoke test (INT-1 / INT-3 / INT-4 / INT-5 + the sequence auto-Pexels resolver, verified present but not yet run live) stays deferred per Cole until the lesson-block phases are done. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 reaffirmed MANDATORY per new block type). Full handoff: `session-144-to-145.md`.

> **SESSION 146 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 4 - INT-7 confidence-weighted knowledge_check SHIPPED + Refine style-preservation fix).** INT-7 is a block-level `confidence_weighted` MODE on the EXISTING `knowledge_check` type (NOT a new block type), so §61 five-surface parity was satisfied by editing existing surfaces with NO migration and NO new edge fn. When the flag is OFF (default/absent), knowledge_check behavior is byte-identical to before. **Backend:** no migration. Verified that `replace_lesson_blocks` / `save_lesson_block_draft` / `upsert_lesson_block_progress` are all type-agnostic and insert config verbatim with no per-key allowlist and no config-shape CHECK constraint, so the new `confidence_weighted` boolean passes through untouched. **Generators (dashboard-paste, esbuild-clean, verify_jwt FALSE, boot-probed OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401, source-verified live via get_edge_function):** `draft-lesson-block` v21 (deploy 31) and `expand-lesson-from-outline` v33 (deploy 33) each gained `confidence_weighted: false` in the knowledge_check schema/hint + a preserve-only-if-already-present rule + `confidence_weighted` in the transform return; `scaffold-lesson-outline` (v31, deploy 31) is EXEMPT (emits outline shape only, no block config). ai-authoring-chat exempt. **Frontend (one Lovable prompt, SHA-verified at HEAD `7db25ac`):** `blockTypeMeta.ts` (blob 53191de7; `confidence_weighted: false` added to the kc defaultConfig); `block-forms/KnowledgeCheckBlockForm.tsx` (Props widened, new "Confidence-weighted (single attempt)" toggle, emit now spreads `...value` FIRST and carries `confidence_weighted`, inaccurate gating copy corrected from "answer every question correctly" to attempt-based); `BlockRenderer.tsx` (blob 360ed7e9; dispatch passes `confidenceWeighted={cfg.confidence_weighted === true}`; KCPerQuestionState gained `confidence: "confident"|"unsure"|null` seeded null; canCheck requires a confidence pick when in mode; handleCheck reveal is `confidenceWeighted ? true : correct ? true : s.revealed` so the default branch is unchanged; single-attempt lock; per-question two-point confidence control; 2x2 confidence-by-correctness quadrant tags with confident-and-wrong flagged "Confident but incorrect - review this" on the amber warning token; quadrant summary). Default path stays byte-identical when the flag is off (the reveal ternary preserves the prior `correct ? true : s.revealed` branch). **BONUS FIX (BQ-REFINE-STYLE-DROP):** per-block "Refine with AI" (draft-lesson-block) dropped author background_color/padding because the generator transform returns only the type shape and `BlockEditorPane.handleRefine` did a full-config replace; fixed FRONTEND-only in `BlockEditorPane.tsx` (blob 50312917) handleRefine, which now merges `background_color`/`padding` forward from the pre-refine config. Correct layer because style is a cross-cutting top-level concern owned by BlockStyleSection (generators deliberately return clean type shapes). The kc-form emit `...value` fix closes the same latent drop class for knowledge_check (the FlashcardsBlockForm-style bug). **VIS-4 confirmed DONE (S145). Phase 4 remaining = INT-6 only; INT-2 DEFERRED, INT-8 QUEUED with its locked design.** **NEXT:** S147 = INT-6 branching scenario (graph-shaped data model, NOT an extension of the linear scenario block; present design locks before any code). Then Cole's locked vendor sequence: (1) Synthesia AI video for building videos (Cole's term "synesthesia integration"; matches the v144/v138 "AI video = Synthesia" decision; Descript MCP is also connected and may factor in), (2) DALL-E image creation, (3) ElevenLabs voiceover, (4) SCORM import/export, (5) API. Full handoff: `session-146-to-147.md`.

> **SESSION 147 DELTA (Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 4 COMPLETE, INT-6 branching_scenario SHIPPED).** The `branching_scenario` interactive lesson-block type (a branching decision tree: each node presents a situation and 2-4 choices that route to different nodes; reaching any terminal node completes the block) is live end to end with full §61 five-surface parity. It is distinct from the linear `scenario` block (which walks `moments[]` in fixed order). Icon `Waypoints`. **Four design locks (all approved by Cole).** (1) STORAGE is a config JSON graph, NO new table; canonical FLAT config `{ instructions, start_node_id, nodes:[{client_id, body(TipTap), node_image_asset_id(uuid|null), is_terminal(bool), outcome_label(plain|null)}], edges:[{client_id, from_node_id, to_node_id, choice_text(plain <=200)}], gating_required, background_color, padding }`; graph integrity is enforced in the renderer plus the generator transform, not the DB. (2) PROGRESS is stateless on the existing `upsert_lesson_block_progress` path, NO new table; completion_data `{path:[node_id,...], reached_terminal:true}`, renderer resumes from `path`. (3) COMPLETION is reaching ANY terminal node (NOT visit-all); a zero-outgoing-edge node is terminal regardless of flag; an empty-nodes block auto-completes. (4) GENERATOR EMIT: the AI emits an adjacency-embedded shape `{instructions, start, nodes:[{key, body_markdown, is_ending, ending_label?, choices:[{label, goes_to}]}]}` and a transform FLATTENS plus validates it (key to uuid map, resolve start with nodes[0] fallback, drop dangling goes_to, derive is_terminal = is_ending OR zero surviving outgoing edges, force at least one terminal, body_markdown to TipTap, node_image_asset_id to null, gating_required to false); AI cap 3-10 nodes, 2-4 choices per node. **Backend (2 migrations, each verified by a separate execute_sql).** `seed_branching_scenario_lesson_block_type` (lesson_block_types row, category interactive, not scored, v1-active) and `add_branching_scenario_to_asset_ref_walker` (CREATE OR REPLACE `_walk_block_config_for_asset_refs` adding the `nodes[]` / `node_image_asset_id` branch, the one walker all three asset RPCs route through, so it covers ref-tracking plus editor signing plus trainee signing). Walker exercised live (image node to one ref at `branching_scenario.nodes[0].node_image_asset_id`; null/absent to zero rows). NOTIFY pgrst run. No new table, no new edge fn. **§61 generators (all boot-probed OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401, verify_jwt FALSE).** `draft-lesson-block` v22 (MCP deploy, function version 33) and `scaffold-lesson-outline` v32 (MCP deploy) and `expand-lesson-from-outline` v34 (dashboard-paste, Cole-deployed). The draft and expand transforms use byte-identical flatten logic (the expand `brand` param is unused for this type; the generic post-transform background tinting is a no-op because the schema emits no background_color, matching sequence/reveal_cards). ai-authoring-chat exempt (v14). **Frontend (one Lovable prompt, SHA-verified at HEAD `6567950`).** `blockTypeMeta.ts` (Waypoints icon + union + META defaultConfig seeding a start+terminal two-node graph with cross-referenced ids + IN_SCOPE), NEW `block-forms/BranchingScenarioBlockForm.tsx` (per-node-card editor: start-node picker, per-node body/image/is_terminal/outcome_label, per-node choices list with a `goes_to` node dropdown; emit spreads `...value` FIRST so block-level bg/padding survive; deleting a node prunes its edges and reassigns start), `BlockEditorPane.tsx` dispatch (passes contentItemId), `BlockRenderer.tsx` (`case "branching_scenario"` to BranchingScenarioRender, ALL hooks before the empty-nodes early return per §137, `done = nodes.length===0 || currentNode.is_terminal`, walks edges on choice clicks, seeds path from completion_data, fires onBlockComplete `{path, reached_terminal:true}`), `lesson-blocks.css` (`bw-branching-*` classes mirroring `bw-scenario-*`, var(--lesson-*) tokens). **DEPLOY-MECHANISM FINDING (durable, CORRECTS the stale "deploy_edge_function truncates above ~25KB" note).** MCP `deploy_edge_function` does NOT truncate at 25KB: the full draft (57KB entrypoint + 3 shared modules) and scaffold (34KB) deployed intact via MCP and round-trip-verified via get_edge_function. The real ceiling is Claude's own inline output, not the tool; expand at 84KB was too large for Claude to stream into a single MCP tool call, so it used the dashboard-paste fallback. Net rule: MCP works to about 57KB, paste needed at about 84KB. **INCIDENT (logged).** While probing the MCP ceiling, a 4-line stub was briefly deployed to draft-lesson-block (function version 32), breaking live per-block Refine for about 5 minutes; recovered immediately by deploying the real v22 (version 33). Lesson: never deploy a throwaway to a live function. **FRONTEND DEVIATION (non-blocking).** Lovable set the node-image `refField` to a static `"image_asset"` instead of the per-node path; `refField` only feeds the upload's audit-reason text plus the asset row's `ref_field` column and is never a functional key, so it is harmless; fold the one-line fix into the next prompt that touches this form. **PHASE 4 COMPLETE** (VIS-4 S145, INT-7 S146, INT-6 S147). INT-2 stays DEFERRED. INT-8 activation poll stays queued with its locked design (S144). NEXT: formal Group C closure docs, then Cole's vendor sequence: Synthesia AI video, DALL-E image creation, ElevenLabs voiceover, SCORM import/export, public API. Full handoff: `session-147-to-148.md`. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): build-queue v150, architecture-reference v148, session-147-to-148.md.

> **SESSION 148 DELTA (HeyGen AI-video pipeline Phase 1 SHIPPED + vendor change to HeyGen).** AI-video vendor = **HeyGen** PAYG, v2 Avatar III (~$1/min), **SUPERSEDING the v138/v144 "AI video = Synthesia" decision** and every Synthesia forward note. Core architecture: every HeyGen generation produces a standalone video `content_item` that rides the EXISTING Mux chain with ZERO changes; the standalone surface (Path A) uses it directly, and the in-lesson `video_embed` block (Path B) REFERENCES it via `source_type:"content_item"` (the content_item id in the existing `source_id`; no migration, no config-schema change). **Backend (all verified):** table `lesson_video_generations` (HeyGen job ledger; status queued->generating->ingesting + rejected/failed; terminal at ingesting, final readiness from `content_items.mux_status`; RLS super-admin SELECT + service_role ALL; `target_kind`/`target_lesson_content_item_id`/`target_block_client_id` reserved for the in-block phase), table `heygen_catalog_cache` (12h DB cache, service_role only), and 3 edge fns: `lesson-heygen-generate` v1 (verify_jwt TRUE, Class A auth + impersonation gate, operates on an existing video content_item, POSTs HeyGen v2 /video/generate), `lesson-heygen-webhook` v2 (verify_jwt FALSE, dual-scheme HMAC-SHA256 verifier, claims to ingesting then Mux-ingests via passthrough=content_item_id), `lesson-heygen-catalog` v2 (verify_jwt TRUE, super-admin; avatar/voice catalog + avatar preview_video_url + voice preview_audio_url + 12h cache + stale-serve + {refresh:true}). Secrets HEYGEN_API_KEY + HEYGEN_WEBHOOK_SECRET (Cole-set; webhook endpoint registered via the docs.heygen.com browser console). The Mux chain (mux-ingest-existing, mux-webhook, get-content-item-video-url, RS256 signed playback) reused untouched. **Frontend (commit `4fe6e1a`, SHA-verified; types.ts regenerated):** `MuxVideoUploadField.tsx` (Upload/Generate-with-AI toggle + catalog dropdowns + script counter + generating-state poll on lesson_video_generations -> ingesting->processing->ready), `VideoEmbedBlockForm.tsx` (`content_item` source type + module-scoped video picker storing the id in source_id), `BlockRenderer.tsx` (MuxPlayer import + ContentItemVideoEmbed + content_item branch in VideoRender). **§61 does NOT trigger** (a `source_type` VARIANT on the existing video_embed block, not a new block type; generators untouched). **VERIFIED:** Path A end to end LIVE (generate -> HeyGen render -> webhook fired + dual-scheme signature verified -> Mux ingest -> content_item mux_status ready + signed playback id + 55.2s -> played in content viewer); the one prior unknown (v2-create -> registered-webhook firing) is RESOLVED. **DURABLE LEARNINGS:** HeyGen v2 fields - avatars preview_image_url + preview_video_url, voices preview_audio (the /v2/voices endpoint; newer developers.heygen.com uses preview_audio_url - read both); webhook events avatar_video.success/fail with event_data.{video_id,url,callback_id}; two signature schemes (v3 Heygen-Signature+Timestamp; legacy Signature). `get_content_item_video_playback` super-admin bypasses publish+assignment but still requires the item to exist + be a video + not archived (else RAISE -> 403); so embedded videos must be in the LESSON'S module for learners (cross-module embeds 403). content_items.module_id is NOT NULL, is_required defaults true, no visibility flag. **PENDING:** Path B reference embed + avatar/voice previews (deferred to one combined check); two delivered-not-applied Lovable prompts (preview UI; `AddBlockPopover` scroll fix `max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto pr-1`). **BUGS LOGGED:** BQ-VIDEOEMBED-STALE-SOURCEID (form keeps stale source_id on source-type switch -> content_item preview 403 flood; fix in the in-block rework), BQ-BLOCKRENDERER-DUP-IMPORT (duplicate Loader2 import, cosmetic). **NEXT (S149):** in-block HeyGen generator built ON TOP of the reference framework via an EMBED-ONLY video content_item (new `is_embed_only` flag; create-RPC super-admin + impersonation gate + §156/§157 grants + §99 audit; teach module-content consumers - learner nav, author lists, §109 completion cascade, §110 cert-path walk - to skip embed-only while playback still resolves; shared generator extracted from MuxVideoUploadField; lesson_video_generations.target_* already supports it), then the HeyGen AI-authoring path (BQ-HEYGEN-AI-AUTHORING; AI writes the script, one-click generate-and-import, controlled explicit-click design). Reference flow STAYS. Group C formal closure carries forward. Full handoff: `session-148-to-149.md`.

> **SESSION 149 DELTA (HeyGen in-block generator + AI-authoring script support SHIPPED).** Two things landed on top of the Session 148 reference framework, no new lesson-block type so §61 does NOT trigger (a config-field + `source_type` variant on the existing `video_embed` block). **(1) IN-BLOCK GENERATOR.** A `video_embed` block can now generate its own AI presenter video via an EMBED-ONLY video content_item, so the generated video never becomes a required/navigable/completion-blocking module item. New column `content_items.is_embed_only` (boolean NOT NULL default false; 56 rows backfilled false). New RPC `create_lesson_embed_video_content_item(p_lesson_content_item_id, p_title, p_reason)` (super-admin + impersonation gate; inserts the video into the lesson's module with is_required=false, is_embed_only=true, quiz fields NULL; new audit action `lesson_embed_video_created` registered per §99). Every module-content consumer was taught to SKIP embed-only (`get_module_detail`, `get_learning_report_detail`, `get_content_item_for_viewer` raises `content_item_embed_only` for non-admins, `get_user_learning_state`) while playback (`get_content_item_video_playback`) still resolves it. `lesson-heygen-generate` advanced to v2 for `target_kind:"lesson_block"`. The embed content_item is created LAZILY on the first Generate click (frontend `resolveEmbedContentItemId`), not at block insert. **(2) AI-AUTHORING SCRIPT SUPPORT.** `video_embed` config gained a plain-text `script` field (the spoken presenter narration, REQUIRED in the generators, no markdown/stage-directions, ~150-350 words, cap ~4000 chars). The three generators only ever produce the script TEXT and never call HeyGen, so AI authoring spends ZERO HeyGen credits; the video is generated only on an explicit Generate click. Generators: `draft-lesson-block` v24, `scaffold-lesson-outline` v33, `expand-lesson-from-outline` v36 (all dashboard-paste, verify_jwt false, esbuild-clean). draft + expand now emit `script` and flip the video_embed transform to `source_type:"content_item"` (source_id null); scaffold reworded its video intent-guide bullet with NO per-lesson video cap (Cole's call) since it emits no block config. **SOURCE_TYPE FLIP RATIONALE (durable):** because the generator always writes a script, the block's intent is always an AI presenter, and `content_item` is what routes `VideoEmbedBlockForm` into the HeyGen generate panel instead of the manual-upload view. **(3) FRONTEND SCRIPT WIRING (applied + SHA-verified on main).** The HeyGen approval gate already existed (the panel has an editable script Textarea + char counter SCRIPT_MAX 4900 + a Generate button disabled until script+avatar+voice are chosen; it never auto-fires). The real gap was that the AI script never reached that box: the generators emitted `supabase_storage` so the form showed the upload view (fixed by the v24/v36 flip), and the panel had no `initialScript` prop and the form did not read `value.script`. NEW `HeygenGeneratePanel.tsx` (SHA d9a907e2): Input import; optional `initialScript`/`onScriptChange` props; script state seeded from initialScript with a re-seed effect; draft state + `handleDraftScript` (calls `draft-lesson-block` block_type video_embed and fills the script box); Textarea onChange calls onScriptChange; a "Draft a script with AI (optional)" row; a Regenerate button on the ready state. `VideoEmbedBlockForm.tsx` (SHA d603c052): `script?: string | null` on Props.value; the panel gets `initialScript={value.script ?? ""}` + an `onScriptChange` that persists `config.script`. The form already spreads `...value` first, so the script survives save (the safe pattern, not the FlashcardsBlockForm drop bug). **PENDING (Cole-side, deferred):** live end-to-end test (AI-build a lesson with a video block, confirm script pre-filled, edit + reopen persistence, draft-script on a manual block, generate then Regenerate; watch that Regenerate reuses the same content_item). **NEXT (S150):** DALL-E image creation, then ElevenLabs voiceover. Full handoff: `session-149-to-150.md`.

### Operations Platform — Zoho replacement (Wave 1, Doc 1) — IN PROGRESS (9-phase roadmap; P1–P6 shipped through Session 115; P7 COMPLETE Session 117; P8 customer-depth+migration COMPLETE Session 118 + first real customer migrated; P9 QA/polish/deploy DEFERRED until after Doc-2 CRM per Session 119)

**STANDING 9-PHASE ROADMAP (authoritative, re-cut Session 114 — supersedes the backend Phase 0–4 decomposition below for sequencing).** Done across Sessions 109–115: P1 money path (S109/S111; in-app refund UI S115, live refund test pending), P2 time+expenses+billing incl. the P2-extras frontend (S110/S114), P3 estimates+conversions COMPLETE (estimate→invoice S112; estimate→project + estimate→retainer S115), P4 recurring/retainers/credit-notes (S113), P5 Reports (S115: 5 fact views + 10-report UI + CSV/PDF), P6 PDF engine + branding (S115: client-side 3-template generator, branding schema/seed/settings, email PDF attach). P7 settings/automation + cross-cutting COMPLETE (S117 — see the P7 bullet). P8 (customer depth + Zoho migration) next, then P9 (QA/polish/deploy).
- **P1 — Money path. SHIPPED, residuals open:** Stripe-dashboard `charge.refunded` subscription (Cole-side), refund-flow UI, first invoice/reminder email live-verification.
- **P2 — Time + expenses into billing. SHIPPED** (backend S110; live timer / weekly grid / calendar / project members / actual-vs-budget dashboard frontend S114).
- **P3 — Estimates + conversions. PARTIAL:** convert → invoice shipped; convert → project and convert → retainer NOT built.
- **P4 — Recurring, retainers, credit notes. SHIPPED.**
- **P5 — Reports. NOT STARTED (next phase):** ~11 SQL views (sales by customer/item, invoice details, payments received, project profitability, project revenue, time tracking, expense by category/customer, top customers, commission) + reports UI (date filters, column customization, CSV/PDF export). Existing ops views are AR-aging/unbilled/balance only — P5 is ~all 11 views + the whole UI.
- **P6 — PDF engine + branding** (3 templates, template-per-customer, logo/colors; minimal invoice PDF may pull forward into P1).
- **P7 — Settings, automation, cross-cutting. COMPLETE (Session 117, order A = cross-cutting primitives first).** DONE + verified: (1) activity-log substrate (operations.audit_log) + document comments + log_activity helper + ops_list_activity / ops_list_comments / ops_add_comment; (2) server-side merge-tag renderer (operations.render_merge) + merge-tag catalog + email-template CRUD/preview + 5 seeded default templates + reminder RPC retrofitted to template-driven rendering + cron v7→dumb-sender; (3) reminder dedup guard + send-log (via audit_log) + ops_record_reminder_sent + manual send (ops_render_invoice_reminder + ops-send-reminder-now v1) + reminder_schedules CRUD + cron v8 records sends; (4) late-fee engine (late_fee_applications + ops_apply_late_fees runner + ops_late_fee_daily cron jobid 27 + late_fee_rules CRUD; one-time-per-rule + apply_to=all in v1); (5) salesperson/commission (operations.users.commission_rate + ops_list_salespeople / ops_set_user_commission_rate / ops_set_document_salesperson + operations.report_commission view, both invoiced and paid bases); (6) custom-fields engine (custom_fields jsonb now on all 8 entity tables; validate_custom_fields helper + ops_list/upsert/delete_custom_field_definition + ops_set_custom_field_values whitelisted-table setter; contact_person is NOT a valid custom-field entity_type per the live CHECK, so 4 tables got the column not 5); (7a) remaining settings CRUD DONE (numbering list+safe-update [no next_number exposure], tax authorities + tax rates CRUD, currencies list+upsert). (7b) consolidated settings UI (Lovable) — 6-tab shell, 3 prompts. P1 (shell + Branding moved + Numbering & Tax CRUD), P2 (Templates & Reminders), and P3 (Late Fees + Sales & Commission + Custom-field defs) all SHIPPED + verified. **P7 COMPLETE.** New §-rule §156 (default privileges auto-grant EXECUTE to authenticated → internal SECDEF helpers need explicit REVOKE FROM authenticated). Edge fns this session: ops-payment-reminder-cron v8, ops-send-reminder-now v1 NEW.
- **P8 — Customer depth + migration. IN PROGRESS (Session 118, order A = depth-first, Zoho migration gated).** Recon: customers/contact_persons/customer_credits tables already exist (contact_persons full per spec but 0 rows + NO CRUD RPC; customer_credits.available_balance is GENERATED amount−applied_amount; credit-note RPCs shipped P4); transaction-tab data already in report_* views + customer_balance_summary (AR only, no credit column); customers has no reminders_disabled / no stored computed balance cols. Locked sequence: (1) contact-person CRUD RPCs + primary-flag exclusivity + cross-org guards; (2) per-customer unused-credit rollup view; (3) statement-of-account RPC (date-range, running balance, unpaid-only); (4) customer-detail tabs UI (8 tabs) + Contacts mgmt + Statement view + statement PDF as a 4th client-side template; (5) generic CSV import (customers + items) with a column-mapping layer so the Zoho export plugs in as config not rebuild. **Zoho-CSV import + reconciliation GATED on a real Zoho export sample (Cole providing later this session); built only after the sample lands.** Statement PDF: build this session (Cole decision). P9 (QA/polish/deploy) is a separate later session.
  - **P8 BACKEND COMPLETE + verified (Session 118).** (1) Contact CRUD: ops_list_contacts / ops_add_contact / ops_update_contact / ops_delete_contact — primary-flag exclusivity on add+update, cross-org guards, partial-update via `p_payload ? key`, activity logged on parent customer (entity_type='customer'); no FK children on contact_persons so delete is hard. (2) operations.customer_account_summary view (security_invoker) = outstanding_balance + open_invoice_count (from customer_balance_summary) + unused_credit_amount + open_credit_count (sum of customer_credits.available_balance>0). (3) ops_customer_statement(customer, from, to, unpaid_only) RETURNS jsonb — ledger model: invoice debit=total_amount (excl draft/void), payment credit=amount−refunded_amount, credit-note credit=total_amount (excl void); customer_credits is NOT a ledger source (avoids double-count vs payment/credit-note lines); running balance via window fn; unpaid_only mode returns open_invoices only + opening_balance null. (4) Generic import ops_import_customers / ops_import_items (jsonb rows, p_mode dry_run|commit, p_on_conflict skip|update) — backend takes pre-normalized rows so the Zoho mapper is a client-side preset; dry_run writes nothing, commit applies; conflict key = lower(display_name) for customers, sku-else-name for items; bad type/status/numeric → warning+default, missing required → per-row error. All SECDEF search_path '' authenticated-only; all functional tests rolled-back DO blocks w/ zero residue. Zoho mapper+reconciliation still gated on Cole's export sample. Edge fns: none this session.

New ContactFormDialog.tsx (create/edit, useEffect-seeds-from-contact, primary checkbox) wired to ops_add_contact/ops_update_contact; delete via ops_delete_contact w/ confirm. Verified: invalidateQueries uses v5 object form throughout; Add resets editingContact to null; payments+credit_notes selects carry currency_code → formatMoney. Existing Apply-credit (ApplyToInvoiceDialog) flow preserved verbatim in the Account Credit tab. **UI Prompt 2 NEXT = Statement tab (ops_customer_statement) + generateStatementPdf/downloadStatementPdf added to src/lib/operations/documentPdf.ts reusing its branding helpers.
