*v151 - Session 149 CLOSE. **In-block HeyGen generator + HeyGen AI-authoring script support SHIPPED on top of the Session 148 reference framework. No new lesson-block TYPE, so §61 five-surface parity does NOT trigger (a config-field + source_type variant on the existing video_embed block). No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold).** **IN-BLOCK GENERATOR (durable).** A video_embed block generates its own AI presenter video through an EMBED-ONLY video content_item, so the generated video never becomes a required/navigable/completion-blocking module item. Column `content_items.is_embed_only` (boolean NOT NULL default false; 56 rows backfilled false). RPC `create_lesson_embed_video_content_item(p_lesson_content_item_id, p_title, p_reason)` (super-admin + impersonation gate; inserts the video into the lesson's module with is_required=false + is_embed_only=true + quiz fields NULL; returns content_item_id; new audit action `lesson_embed_video_created` registered in super_admin_action_types per §99). Every module-content consumer skips embed-only (get_module_detail, get_learning_report_detail, get_content_item_for_viewer raises content_item_embed_only for non-admins, get_user_learning_state) while get_content_item_video_playback still resolves it. lesson-heygen-generate advanced to v2 for target_kind:"lesson_block". The embed content_item is created LAZILY on the first Generate click (frontend resolveEmbedContentItemId), not at block insert. **AI-AUTHORING SCRIPT SUPPORT (durable).** video_embed config gained a plain-text `script` field (spoken presenter narration; REQUIRED in the generators; no markdown/stage-directions; ~150-350 words; cap ~4000 chars in generation, panel SCRIPT_MAX 4900). The three generators only ever produce the script TEXT and NEVER call HeyGen, so AI authoring spends ZERO HeyGen credits; the video is generated only on an explicit Generate click. Generators: draft-lesson-block v24, scaffold-lesson-outline v33, expand-lesson-from-outline v36 (all dashboard-paste, verify_jwt false, esbuild-clean). draft + expand emit `script` and flip the video_embed transform return to source_type:"content_item" (source_id null); scaffold reworded its video intent-guide bullet with NO per-lesson video cap (Cole rejected a cap) since it emits no block config. **SOURCE_TYPE FLIP RATIONALE (durable):** because the generator always writes a script, the block's intent is always an AI presenter, and content_item is what routes VideoEmbedBlockForm into the HeyGen generate panel instead of the manual-upload view. The block creates the embed-only content_item only on Generate; until then source_id stays null. **FRONTEND SCRIPT WIRING (applied + SHA-verified on main).** The HeyGen approval gate already existed (the panel has an editable script Textarea + char counter + a Generate button disabled until script+avatar+voice are chosen; it never auto-fires). The real gap was that the AI script never reached that box: the generators emitted supabase_storage so the form showed the upload view (closed by the v24/v36 flip), and the panel had no initialScript prop and the form did not read value.script. NEW HeygenGeneratePanel.tsx (SHA d9a907e2): Input import; optional initialScript/onScriptChange props; script state seeded from initialScript with a re-seed effect; draftPrompt/drafting/draftError state + handleDraftScript (calls draft-lesson-block block_type video_embed, fills the script box from config.script); Textarea onChange calls onScriptChange; a "Draft a script with AI (optional)" input+button row; a Regenerate button on the ready state (onClick sets state idle). VideoEmbedBlockForm.tsx (SHA d603c052): script?: string | null on Props.value; the panel gets initialScript={value.script ?? ""} + an onScriptChange that persists config.script. The form already spreads ...value first, so the script survives save (the safe pattern, not the FlashcardsBlockForm drop bug). **VERIFIED:** is_embed_only column + RPC + audit action via execute_sql; both frontend files re-fetched from refs/heads/main and confirmed at the SHAs above. **PENDING (Cole-side, deferred):** live end-to-end test (AI-build a lesson with a video block, confirm script pre-filled, edit + reopen persistence, draft-script on a manual block, generate then Regenerate; watch that Regenerate reuses the same content_item, re-running lesson-heygen-generate on an item that already has a video). **NEXT (S150):** DALL-E image creation, then ElevenLabs voiceover. No cron / RLS change beyond is_embed_only; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched; Mux chain untouched. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v151 entry, architecture-reference v150, session-149-to-150.md.*

*v150 - Session 148 CLOSE (also closes the missing S147 numbered slot; the full INT-6 branching_scenario record lives in the SESSION 147 DELTA banner above and architecture-reference v148). **HeyGen AI-video pipeline Phase 1 SHIPPED and proven end to end; AI-video vendor changed to HeyGen. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 five-surface parity does NOT trigger - the video_embed block gained a source_type VARIANT, not a new block type).** **VENDOR (durable, SUPERSEDES v138/v144).** AI video = HeyGen PAYG, v2 Avatar III (~$1/min), over Synthesia (true standalone REST API, education-friendlier moderation, PAYG). Descript MCP connected but unused for generation. **ARCHITECTURE (durable).** Every generation produces a standalone video content_item that rides the EXISTING Mux chain unchanged; Path A (standalone) uses it directly, Path B (in-lesson) is a video_embed block referencing it via source_type:"content_item" (id in source_id; no migration, no schema change). **BACKEND.** Table `lesson_video_generations` (job ledger; queued->generating->ingesting + rejected/failed; terminal at ingesting, readiness from content_items.mux_status; RLS super-admin SELECT + service_role ALL, anon revoked; partial-unique on heygen_video_id; target_kind/target_lesson_content_item_id/target_block_client_id reserved for the in-block phase). Table `heygen_catalog_cache` (12h singleton cache, service_role only, §157 revoke). Edge fns: `lesson-heygen-generate` v1 (verify_jwt true, Class A auth + impersonation gate permission_change, operates on an existing video content_item, validates item_type + script<=4900 + 10/hr, POSTs HeyGen v2 /video/generate callback_id=row id 1920x1080, stores heygen_video_id + generating), `lesson-heygen-webhook` v2 (verify_jwt false, dual-scheme HMAC-SHA256 over raw body - Heygen-Signature+Heygen-Timestamp else legacy Signature - OPTIONS 200 probe, success->atomic claim to ingesting->Mux ingest passthrough=content_item_id->mux_status preparing, Mux fail reverts to generating+502, fail->classifyFailure rejected/failed), `lesson-heygen-catalog` v2 (verify_jwt true, super-admin; /v2/avatars + /v2/voices trimmed; v2 adds avatar preview_video_url + voice preview_audio_url [read preview_audio ?? preview_audio_url], 12h cache, stale-serve, {refresh:true}). Secrets HEYGEN_API_KEY + HEYGEN_WEBHOOK_SECRET (Cole-set; webhook registered via docs.heygen.com browser console). Mux chain reused untouched. **FRONTEND (commit 4fe6e1a, SHA-verified; types.ts regenerated):** MuxVideoUploadField.tsx (Upload/Generate-with-AI toggle, catalog dropdowns, script counter, generating-state poll on lesson_video_generations -> ingesting->processing->ready/error), VideoEmbedBlockForm.tsx (content_item source type "Generated / library video" + module-scoped picker storing id in source_id + status hint, ...value preserved), BlockRenderer.tsx (MuxPlayer import + ContentItemVideoEmbed calling get-content-item-video-url {p_content_item_id} with processing/403 handling + content_item branch in VideoRender). **VERIFIED:** Path A LIVE end to end (generate -> webhook fired + dual-scheme sig verified -> Mux ingest -> content_item mux_status ready + signed playback id + 55.2s -> played); the v2-create->registered-webhook firing unknown RESOLVED. Path B reference embed + avatar/voice previews deferred to one combined check. **DURABLE:** HeyGen v2 fields (avatars preview_image_url+preview_video_url; voices preview_audio); avatar_video.success/fail events; two signature schemes; get_content_item_video_playback super-admin bypasses publish+assignment but still requires the item to exist+be a video+not archived (else 403), so embeds must be in the lesson's module (cross-module 403 for learners); content_items.module_id NOT NULL, is_required default true, no visibility flag. **DELIVERED-NOT-APPLIED (Lovable):** preview UI (avatar image+clip + voice sample on the content item field; referenced-video preview on the block form) and the AddBlockPopover scroll fix (max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto pr-1). **BUGS:** BQ-VIDEOEMBED-STALE-SOURCEID (form keeps stale source_id on source-type switch -> content_item preview 403 flood; fix in the in-block rework), BQ-BLOCKRENDERER-DUP-IMPORT (cosmetic). **NEXT (S149):** in-block HeyGen generator ON TOP of the reference framework via an EMBED-ONLY video content_item (new is_embed_only flag; create-RPC super-admin + impersonation gate + §156/§157 grants + §99 audit, inserting the video in the lesson's module with is_required=false + is_embed_only=true; teach every module-content consumer - learner nav, author lists, §109 completion cascade, §110 cert-path tree-walk - to skip is_embed_only while playback still resolves; shared generator extracted from MuxVideoUploadField; the block creates the content_item on first generate and stores its id in source_id; lesson_video_generations.target_* already supports it), then the HeyGen AI-authoring path (BQ-HEYGEN-AI-AUTHORING: lesson AI writes the script, video_embed becomes AI-authorable with one-click generate-and-import, controlled explicit-click design). Reference flow STAYS. Group C formal closure carries forward (was the S148 priority but displaced by the HeyGen build). No cron / RLS change beyond the two new tables; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched; Mux chain and all lesson-block generators untouched. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v150 entry, architecture-reference v149, session-148-to-149.md.*

*v149 - Session 146 CLOSE. **Lesson Experience uplift Phase 4: INT-7 confidence-weighted knowledge_check SHIPPED as a block-level MODE on the EXISTING knowledge_check type (NOT a new block type; no migration, no new edge fn), plus the BQ-REFINE-STYLE-DROP frontend fix. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 satisfied via existing-surface edits since no new block type was introduced).** **CONFIDENCE_WEIGHTED MODE (durable).** A new optional block-level boolean `confidence_weighted` (default false) on knowledge_check. When false/absent the block is byte-identical to before. When true: each question shows a two-point confidence control ("I'm confident" / "Not sure") that must be chosen before Check is enabled; Check is a single terminal attempt (reveal locks regardless of correctness, no retry); the explanation shows either way; and a 2x2 confidence-by-correctness quadrant tags each answer (confident+correct green #2D6A4F, confident+incorrect amber #FFB703 flagged "Confident but incorrect - review this" as the priority misconception, unsure+correct teal #006D77, unsure+incorrect gray #6D6875), with a quadrant summary. Completion still fires on allAttempted (answered, not answered-correctly), unchanged. **BACKEND: no migration.** replace_lesson_blocks / save_lesson_block_draft / upsert_lesson_block_progress are type-agnostic and store config verbatim (no per-key allowlist, no config-shape CHECK), so the new boolean passes through. **GENERATORS:** draft-lesson-block v21 (deploy 31) + expand-lesson-from-outline v33 (deploy 33) each gained confidence_weighted in the kc schema/hint + transform return with a preserve-only-if-already-present rule; scaffold-lesson-outline EXEMPT (outline shape only); ai-authoring-chat exempt. All dashboard-paste, esbuild-clean, verify_jwt FALSE, boot-probed, source-verified live. **FRONTEND (one Lovable prompt, SHA-verified at HEAD 7db25ac):** blockTypeMeta.ts (53191de7), KnowledgeCheckBlockForm.tsx (toggle + emit spreads ...value first + carries the flag + corrected gating copy), BlockRenderer.tsx (360ed7e9; confidenceWeighted prop, KCPerQuestionState.confidence field seeded null, canCheck gate, single-attempt reveal `confidenceWeighted ? true : correct ? true : s.revealed`, quadrant tags + summary). **BQ-REFINE-STYLE-DROP fix (frontend-only).** Per-block Refine-with-AI dropped author background_color/padding (draft transform returns only the type shape + handleRefine full-replace); fixed in BlockEditorPane.tsx (50312917) handleRefine by merging background_color/padding forward from the pre-refine config. The kc-form ...value emit closes the same latent FlashcardsBlockForm-style drop for knowledge_check. **VIS-4 DONE (S145); Phase 4 remaining = INT-6 only; INT-2 DEFERRED; INT-8 QUEUED with locked design.** NEXT: S147 INT-6 branching scenario (design locks first), then Cole's vendor sequence Synthesia video -> DALL-E images -> ElevenLabs VO -> SCORM import/export -> API. Sessions 143-145 left open-queue banners but no numbered changelog entry, so this continues the integer sequence from v148. No cron / RLS / schema change; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v149 entry, architecture-reference v147, session-146-to-147.md.*

*v148 - Session 142 CLOSE. **Lesson Experience uplift Phase 3 STARTED: INT-3 the `hotspot` interactive lesson-block type SHIPPED end to end with full §61 5-surface parity. Three migrations, one new vision edge fn, three generators versioned, two frontend commits. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 5-surface parity reaffirmed MANDATORY per new block type).** **HOTSPOT BLOCK (durable).** A labeled image with 2-12 clickable markers; the learner clicks each marker to reveal a short note (Popover), and opening all markers completes the block. STATELESS by design: NO dedicated table and NO block-specific RPC (distinct from INT-1 open_response which needed per-attempt storage); completion rides the existing sticky onBlockComplete -> reportProgress -> upsert_lesson_block_progress path; an empty-hotspots block auto-completes; gating_required defaults false. CONFIG SCHEMA is FLAT, matching the image block: { asset_id, alt, attribution, instructions, hotspots:[{client_id, x(0-100 percent), y(0-100 percent), label(plain text), content(TipTap doc)}], gating_required, background_color, padding }. Marker x/y are stored as 0-100 percentages of the image box. **BACKEND (3 migrations, each apply_migration then separate execute_sql verify).** (1) seed_hotspot_lesson_block_type: public.lesson_block_types row (block_type='hotspot', category='interactive', is_interactive=true, is_scored=false, is_v1_active=true) - replace_lesson_blocks validates block_type against this table; save_lesson_block_draft + upsert_lesson_block_progress are type-agnostic. (2) add_hotspot_to_asset_ref_walker: CREATE OR REPLACE public._walk_block_config_for_asset_refs added 'hotspot' to the single-asset IN-list emitting ref_field 'hotspot_asset'; because all three asset RPCs (ref-tracking, editor signing, trainee signing) route through this one walker, the single change covers asset tracking + both signing paths at once. (3) create_lesson_hotspot_autoplace_log: rate-limit table public.lesson_hotspot_autoplace_log (id uuid pk, user_id not null, content_item_id, created_at; index (user_id, created_at DESC); RLS ENABLED; REVOKE ALL FROM authenticated,anon per §157) - the only new table this session, justifying the 10/hr vision rate limit (no generic rate-limit helper exists; pg_proc checked). **NEW VISION EDGE FN lesson-hotspot-autoplace v1 (durable, verify_jwt TRUE).** Class A pattern (getClaims + super-admin account_type check + impersonation gate 'permission_change'; _shared/impersonation_gate.ts byte-copied from lesson-ingest-pexels-asset). Input { content_item_id, asset_id, hotspots:[{client_id, label, content_text?}] }. Flow: rate-limit count (>=10/hr -> 429) then insert a log row; resolve the asset via serviceClient.rpc get_lesson_block_assets(p_content_item_id, p_extra_asset_ids:[asset_id]) -> bucket/path; storage download; base64 (jsr:@std/encoding); ONE Opus vision call (claude-opus-4-7, x-api-key + anthropic-version 2023-06-01, image + text asking strict JSON [{client_id,x,y}]); clamp x/y 0-100, keep only known client_ids; return {placements, model}. MAX_IMAGE_BYTES 5MB. Boot-probed (OPTIONS 204, no-auth POST 401). **FRONTEND (2 Lovable prompts, GitHub-API SHA-verified).** Prompt 1 (main commit c67caf40, §61 surfaces 2+3): blockTypeMeta.ts (Target icon + 'hotspot' in BlockType union + BLOCK_TYPE_META + IN_SCOPE_BLOCK_TYPES; AddBlockPopover is dynamic so no picker edit); NEW block-forms/HotspotBlockForm.tsx (reuses the Pexels picker via FileUploadField refField='image_asset' -> newsletter-image-search -> lesson-ingest-pexels-asset, registerNewAssetId via useLessonBlockAssetUrls; click-to-place bw-hotspot-canvas clamps 0-100; numbered markers with stopPropagation; 12 cap, <2 advisory; numeric x/y; RichTextEditor content; gating Switch); BlockEditorPane.tsx dispatch; BlockRenderer.tsx (Popover import; case 'hotspot' -> HotspotRender with ALL hooks before the early return per §137; savedProgress seeds the opened set + completionFiredRef; trainee-gated completion with empty=auto-complete; PopoverContent themed via var(--lesson-surface)/--lesson-primary); lesson-blocks.css (bw-hotspot-canvas, bw-hotspot-marker, prefers-reduced-motion guard). Prompt 2 (main commit d6c9c695): HotspotBlockForm.tsx gained Wand2 + module-scope tiptapToPlainText + autoPlacing state + runAutoPlace() invoking supabase.functions.invoke('lesson-hotspot-autoplace',{content_item_id, asset_id, hotspots:[{client_id,label,content_text}]}) then applying placements by client_id (clamp 0-100), behind an "Auto-place with AI" button disabled until autoPlacing || !asset_id || hotspots.length===0 || !contentItemId; ai-pane/Stage2Outline.tsx broadened two conditions to (block_type==='image' || block_type==='hotspot') so hotspot is image-bearing at outline review (approval gating + ImageResolutionSection render); ai-pane/AiPane.tsx broadened the stitch condition to set config.asset_id + config.attribution + onRegisterAsset for hotspot. types.ts unchanged (no change needed). **AiPane IMAGE PATH (durable):** OutlineItem carries image_query/image_resolved{asset_id,attribution,thumb_url}/image_skipped; the outline cannot be approved until every image-bearing item is resolved or skipped; on build the resolved asset is stitched onto the block. Hotspot now rides this SAME path as the image block; the walker change tracks the hotspot_asset ref on save. **§61 AI-AUTHORING PARITY (all three dashboard-paste, reproduced full from get_edge_function, esbuild-clean, verify_jwt FALSE, boot-probed OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401).** draft-lesson-block v17 (deploy counter 26): BLOCK_SCHEMAS.hotspot (author uploads image so asset_id null; alt 5-15 words; hotspots 2-12 with label plain 1-5 words + content_markdown inline-only; do NOT emit x/y/asset_id/client_id/attribution/gating_required) + transformConfigForCanvas case 'hotspot' (asset_id:null, attribution:null, instructions, hotspots with client_id uuid + placeholder x=Math.round((i+1)/(n+1)*100) + y= i%2?60:40 + label + content via mdToTipTap, gating_required:false); no image_query (matches its image block = author-upload). scaffold-lesson-outline v28: 'hotspot' added to ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES + one intent-guide bullet (20 bullets total). expand-lesson-from-outline v29: 'hotspot' added to ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES + BLOCK_SCHEMA_HINTS.hotspot + transformConfigForCanvas case 'hotspot' (same placeholder-coords shape as draft) + a builder rule; the generic post-transform background tinting already covers hotspot (neither divider nor callout); brand section / windowing / toTint intact (20 transform cases). **DESIGN LOCK (durable):** the text generators emit hotspot label + content but PLACEHOLDER marker coords (even x-spread, staggered y), NOT image-accurate; accurate placement comes only from the vision auto-place button or manual drag. draft-lesson-block does NOT resolve an image (author uploads). **SUPERSEDED DECISION (durable):** an earlier "generators emit image_query" plan was overturned after reading the code - expand's image block emits asset_id:null and images resolve at the OUTLINE stage in the frontend (AiPane) via image_resolved then stitch onto the block; no image_query field exists, so hotspot reuses that path. **WHAT THE FULL STACK ENABLES:** AI chat (scaffold->expand) builds a hotspot fully (image resolved at outline review, AI labels+content, placeholder coords); per-block Iterate/Refine (draft-lesson-block) builds hotspot labels+content; the author then runs Auto-place with AI (vision) or drags markers, and uploads/keeps the image. **VERIFICATION:** generators boot-probed; frontend prompt 1 at main c67caf40, prompt 2 at main d6c9c695, all files hash-matched the GitHub API blob SHAs (CDN cross-checked per §117) and wiring grep-confirmed. **Edge fn versions: lesson-hotspot-autoplace v1 NEW, draft-lesson-block v17, scaffold-lesson-outline v28, expand-lesson-from-outline v29; ai-authoring-chat unchanged at v14. No cron; RLS only on lesson_hotspot_autoplace_log; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.** Carryforward (Cole-side, non-blocking): live hotspot end-to-end test (build via chat, auto-place, trainee completion) + the carried INT-1 in-app end-to-end test + AI-authoring functional check (from S140). **NEXT (Phase 3 remaining):** INT-4 click-to-reveal (needs a one-line differentiation vs accordion/button_stack/tabs when reached), INT-5 drag-to-order (precedent: card_sort + knowledge_check ranking/timeline), INT-8 activation poll (lesson-level cover poll, architecturally distinct, heaviest, last). Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v148 entry, architecture-reference v143, session-142-to-143.md.*

*v147 - Session 141 CLOSE. **Lesson Experience uplift Phase 2 COMPLETE: VIS-3 (brand-textured cover + branded section bands and viewer chrome) and VIS-6 (static end-of-lesson recap + completion card + section reward pill). Frontend only, zero backend, no new block type, no migration, no edge-fn/RLS/cron change; all on the v140 render-time brand-var layer. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold).** **VIS-3 (durable).** Decision: NO stock-photo hero; the hero is a CSS brand-texture derived entirely from existing lesson_brands color slots via color-mix (already used in the block CSS), so zero new data and no reuse of lesson-ingest-pexels-asset (its private-bucket asset would force a signing seam into the public cover). LessonTitleCard.tsx hero band: solid var(--cover-primary) -> dark-anchored linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cover-primary), color-mix toward #000 ~18%) under a radial var(--cover-accent) glow + faint BrainWiseMark watermark (opacity 0.06, relative z-10 content); white text kept (readableTextColorForBg deliberately NOT imported). LessonBlockViewer.tsx section band: literal rgba(2,31,54,0.06) -> color-mix gradient of var(--lesson-primary) toward var(--lesson-surface) (9%->4%), rule + badge on var(--lesson-cta). Viewer chrome: TOC progress bar, TOC active dot, Continue + Complete buttons moved from --bw-orange to var(--lesson-cta) (buttons: inline backgroundColor + hover:opacity-90, the cover Start-button pattern). MOBILE-PORTAL FACT (durable): the mobile TOC is a Radix Sheet that portals to document root, escaping style={lessonBrandVars}; --bw-orange resolved there only as a :root token, so SheetContent now carries style={lessonBrandVars}. NET: --bw-orange eliminated from the lesson viewer; all cover + band + chrome theming reads lesson_brands via the v140 brand-var layer (--cover-* on the cover root, --lesson-* on the viewer wrapper), falling back to BrainWise defaults only on no brand row / null slot. --bw-forest + readableTextColorForBg stay fixed semantics. **VIS-6 (durable).** Decision: static recap (A) + inline completion card (i) + both lesson-end and section-level; AI recap deferred to Track 5. KEY FACT: finishing a content_item lesson had NO completion moment (ContentItemViewer openCascade skips tier='content_item'; cascade modal is module/curriculum/certification only). All in LessonBlockViewer.tsx, reuses bw-section-enter, no BlockRenderer/CSS/import change: (1) the banner became a COMPLETION CARD on the final section when isCompleted (forest header in var(--font-display), 'You finished {title}', recap titled 'What you can now do' from content_items.outcomes else 'What you covered' from heading topics [hidden if neither], stat chips for sections / passedChecks-over-totalChecks [knowledge_check intersect completedIds] / ~totalMinutes; Previous + Start-again preserved; success=forest semantic, label=--lesson-accent, checks=--lesson-cta); (2) a forest 'Section complete' pill per section footer, shown when completedSections.has(currentSectionIdx) && !(isFinalSection && isCompleted). DESIGN LOCK: the single footer pill covers BOTH the section-completion and gated-block-clearance triggers (clearing the last gating-required block is what flips a section complete), footer placement makes it feel earned, and per-block toasts/confetti were rejected as noisy; the lesson-tier completion moment is inline NOT a modal (to avoid stacking under the module/curriculum cascade modal). **VERIFICATION:** main commit fa9e2f7f; LessonTitleCard.tsx blob ad25a8c8, LessonBlockViewer.tsx blob 6c7737b7 (API-authoritative, matched git-hash-object of raw@main so CDN confirmed fresh, per §117). No edge fn / cron / RLS / schema change; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched. Carryforward (Cole-side, non-blocking): INT-1 in-app end-to-end test + AI-authoring functional check (from S140). NEXT (Phase 3): INT-3 hotspot, INT-4 reveal, INT-5 sequence, INT-8 activation poll, each a NEW block type so §61 5-surface parity is MANDATORY per type. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): build-queue v147, architecture-reference v142, session-141-to-142.md.*

*v146 - Session 140 CLOSE. **Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 2: INT-1 (AI open-response feedback block) SHIPPED end to end + full §61 AI-authoring parity for the new block type. One migration, one new edge fn, three edge fns versioned, one frontend commit. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; §61 block-parity reaffirmed as MANDATORY-no-deferral for every new block type).** **INT-1 OPEN_RESPONSE BLOCK (the Phase 2 differentiator).** A new interactive lesson-block type open_response: the learner writes a free-text reflection and receives AI formative coaching (no score, no right answer). BACKEND (migration int1_open_response_storage_and_rpcs, applied + verified): table public.lesson_open_responses (id, user_id, content_item_id, block_id, attempt_number, response_text, ai_feedback, model, created_at; UNIQUE(user_id,block_id,attempt_number); FK cascades; RLS = own/super-admin/active-mentor SELECT + service_role ALL; secret-table grants = REVOKE ALL FROM authenticated,anon then explicit grants per §157). RPCs (SECDEF): _authorize_lesson_block_for_trainee(p_block_id,p_user_id default null) internal gate, a byte-copy of the live lesson-asset RPC gate (LMS entitlement + self/super-admin/active-mentor + published non-archived lesson + active/completed assignment; postgres+service_role only, REVOKE authenticated); prepare_lesson_open_response(p_block_id) + record_lesson_open_response(p_block_id,p_response_text,p_ai_feedback,p_model default null) (authenticated+service_role; impersonation gate; 10/hr rate limit; attempt-numbered insert). lesson_block_types row open_response (category interactive, is_scored false, is_v1_active true). NOTIFY pgrst. EDGE FN lesson-open-response-feedback v1 NEW (verify_jwt TRUE; single Opus claude-opus-4-7 via x-api-key + anthropic-version 2023-06-01, parse content[0].text; formative coaching only, never a score). FRONTEND (Lovable, commit 0dfbc1800022c3029fbaab8a76a9e02e3a859e6c, GitHub-API SHA-verified): blockTypeMeta.ts (open_response in the BlockType union + BLOCK_TYPE_META + IN_SCOPE_BLOCK_TYPES; AddBlockPopover is dynamic off these two, so no picker edit), NEW block-forms/OpenResponseBlockForm.tsx, BlockEditorPane.tsx dispatch line, BlockRenderer.tsx OpenResponseRender (editor mode = disabled preview; trainee mode = textarea + submit -> supabase.functions.invoke("lesson-open-response-feedback",{block_id,response_text}) -> feedback + onBlockComplete; mount rehydrate from lesson_open_responses latest attempt; 429 handling; all hooks before the mode==="editor" early return per §137; brand-var styling, no literal brand hexes), regenerated types.ts. **INT-1 DECISIONS (locked):** dedicated table storage (per-attempt, mentor-review-ready, not a progress JSON blob); verify_jwt true + SECDEF gate + 10/hr + single Opus; submit-once = complete, gating_required default FALSE (author-overridable), sticky, via the existing onBlockComplete -> reportProgress -> upsert_lesson_block_progress path. In trainee mode EditorBlock.client_id === the DB lesson_blocks.id, so OpenResponse passes blockClientId straight to the edge fn as block_id. replace_lesson_blocks validates block_type against lesson_block_types (the new row covers it); save_lesson_block_draft + upsert_lesson_block_progress are type-agnostic. **§61 AI-AUTHORING PARITY (now MANDATORY, no deferral — Cole directive).** Every new block type gets full parity across the three lesson-authoring generators in the same arc it ships: draft-lesson-block (file-header v16; Supabase deploy counter 26) added BLOCK_SCHEMAS.open_response + a transformConfigForCanvas case (Refine-with-AI does a wholesale config replace); scaffold-lesson-outline (v27; deploy 27) added open_response to ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES + an intent-guide bullet (THIS is the fn that proposes open_response into an outline); expand-lesson-from-outline (v28; deploy 28) added open_response to ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES + a BLOCK_SCHEMA_HINTS entry + a transformConfigForCanvas case (prompt/guidance/placeholder/min_length/gating_required) + a builder rule (the generic post-transform background tinting already covers it since it is neither divider nor callout). All three are verify_jwt false and DASHBOARD-PASTE (over the MCP inline size limit); they were reproduced as full files from the authoritative deployed get_edge_function source (the app repo supabase/functions/ does NOT contain these functions), syntax-validated (esbuild parse clean on all three), and boot-probed after Cole deployed them (OPTIONS 204 + no-auth POST 401 missing_bearer_token on all three, confirming compile + boot + the internal getClaims auth gate held with verify_jwt off). **ai-authoring-chat (v14) DELIBERATELY UNTOUCHED + VERIFIED (durable).** It carries no ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES / schema / per-type guide in code; its block awareness comes only from the ai_authoring_context table, whose active lesson-authoring rows (platform_overview, framework_terminology, scientific_foundations, output_format_rules, guardrails) enumerate ZERO block types (only newsletter_html_authoring_spec mentions block types, and that is the newsletter spec, irrelevant to lessons). It is type-agnostic at the code AND data level and it does NOT generate the outline (scaffold does), so it is not required for open_response to appear in or build from outlines. The only way to make the Stage-1 co-pilot proactively pitch reflections would be to add a FULL block catalog to ai_authoring_context, which is an optional product enhancement (it would change how the co-pilot discusses all block types), NOT a §61 parity fix. **INCIDENTAL (flagged, not actioned):** all lesson-authoring edge fns load every active ai_authoring_context row, including the ~30KB newsletter_html_authoring_spec, so each lesson-authoring Opus call carries the full newsletter HTML spec as irrelevant context and wastes input tokens; candidate for a scoped-context-load cleanup. **PENDING (Cole-side):** INT-1 in-app end-to-end test (first live Opus round-trip: add an open_response block to the test lesson, submit, confirm feedback returns + persists + marks complete + rehydrates on reload + editor shows a disabled preview) and the AI-authoring functional check (outline proposes a reflection, expands into an open_response block, Refine-with-AI works on one). **Edge fn versions: lesson-open-response-feedback v1 NEW, draft-lesson-block v16, scaffold-lesson-outline v27, expand-lesson-from-outline v28; ai-authoring-chat unchanged at v14. No cron / no RLS beyond lesson_open_responses / no other schema changes; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.** **NEXT (Phase 2 remaining):** VIS-3 (hero imagery / image-forward layout, reuse lesson-ingest-pexels-asset v2) FIRST, and Cole asked for the VIS-3 OPTIONS to be RE-PRESENTED for a decision before any Lovable prompt; then VIS-6 (end-of-lesson recap + completion moment, optional AI recap). Phase 3 = INT-3 hotspot / INT-4 reveal / INT-5 sequence / INT-8 activation poll; Phase 4 = INT-2 personalization / INT-6 branching / INT-7 confidence; plus VIS-4 media-beside-text two-column. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v146 entry, architecture-reference v141, session-140-to-141.md.*

*v145 - Session 139 CLOSE. **Lesson Experience uplift, Phase 1 SHIPPED + verified: section bands, progress indicators, paced-reveal animation, brand-aware pull-quote, and brand fonts inside blocks, plus a render-time per-lesson brand-variable layer (colors + fonts) and a full block-theming brandability sweep, plus a hooks-order crash fix. Frontend only, no backend, no new block types; all files SHA-verified at HEAD 3a0a670. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; reinforces the §137 React hooks-order convention and §117 GitHub-API-SHA frontend verification).** **HOOKS-ORDER CRASH FIX (commit 3874c64).** The rebuilt 42-block test lesson threw React #310 ("rendered more hooks than during the previous render") on launch: the tocEntries + activeTopicId useMemos in LessonBlockViewer.tsx sat AFTER the loading/error early returns, and a lesson that reliably loads assets first trips the extra-hook path. Both useMemos moved above the `if (blocksQuery.isLoading || assetsLoading)` guard. Same class as the §137 AssessmentFlow/Onboarding fixes. **VIS-1 SECTION BANDS (commit 3874c64).** Sections (runs of blocks between button_stack continue delimiters) now open with a numbered band (navy-tint rgba(2,31,54,0.06) + orange left rule + numbered badge + section title + "~N min" chip) that REPLACES the leading level-2 heading; the band carries the promoted heading's setBlockRef + data-block-id so the TOC scroll still lands, and the heading is skipped from the body render. Degrades to number + time when a section has no leading heading. NEW lessonEstimate.ts (BLOCK_MINUTE_WEIGHTS + estimateMinutes, extracted from LessonTitleCard's private copy; cover now imports it). **VIS-2 PROGRESS INDICATORS (commit a8f67e2).** completedSections useMemo (section complete = visited AND all its gating-required blocks in completedIds); resume effect seeds visitedSections 0..currentIdx; TOC header gained an orange progress bar + "X/Y"; per-entry indicator (forest CheckCircle2 done / orange dot active / hollow circle todo). **VIS-5 PACED-REVEAL ANIMATION (commit 4dc950b).** lesson-blocks.css keyframes bw-section-in (fade + 8px rise) + .bw-section-enter (280ms ease-out) + prefers-reduced-motion guard; viewer wraps the band + blocks (not the footer) in a keyed div so each Continue advance replays. **VIS-7 BRAND-AWARE PULL-QUOTE (commit d513e6d then brand-aware).** QuoteRender in BlockRenderer.tsx swapped to a .bw-pullquote class (oversized decorative quote mark, larger navy body, uppercase muted attribution); callout (4 variants) + stat_callout were already well-styled, so VIS-7 scoped to the quote only. **PER-LESSON BRAND-VARIABLE LAYER + BRANDABILITY SWEEP (commits 8d05e51, 109bc60, 52e45ad).** Cole's requirement: every color the lesson surfaces must be brandable. Before this, only LessonTitleCard + LessonBrandPanel read lesson_brands; blocks had NO render-time brand layer (cover self-brands; block bg tints baked at generation). FIX: viewer + editor now query lesson_brands (reusing lessonBrandQueryKey) and set CSS vars on their wrappers - viewer main return and editor canvas both carry style={lessonBrandVars} mapping color_primary->--lesson-primary, color_cta->--lesson-cta, color_accent->--lesson-accent, color_surface->--lesson-surface (with BrainWise defaults). Sweep B1 (CSS, 109bc60): standalone brand literals in lesson-blocks.css blanket-replaced with var(--lesson-*, <default>) (cta 18 / primary 22 / surface 8 / accent 1); already-var() lines untouched (no double-wrap); semantics intact (green 14 / red 8 / gray 22). Sweep B2 (renderer, 52e45ad): property-scoped replacements in BlockRenderer.tsx (backgroundColor/color/borderColor brand literals -> var(--lesson-*), which naturally skip the readableTextColorForBg contrast helper); tabs Tailwind brackets bg-[#F5741A]->bg-[var(--lesson-cta)] etc; flashcard face fallback -> var(--lesson-surface,#FFFFFF); callout info -> accent + important -> cta via color-mix(in srgb, var(...) 10%, #ffffff); warning/success kept semantic. **KEEP-FIXED (durable): forest #2D6A4F, red #D62828, amber #FFB703, gray #6D6875 + Tailwind grays, white, and readableTextColorForBg all stay literal - they are status/contrast, not brand.** **VIS-8 BRAND FONTS INSIDE BLOCKS (commit 3a0a670).** Recon: blocks did NOT inherit brand fonts (Tailwind font-display maps to a literal Poppins stack, not var(--font-display), and --font-display was undefined globally, so the block CSS var(--font-display, "Poppins"...) always fell back). FIX (5 files): NEW lessonFonts.ts (FONT_MAP + resolveFont, extracted from the cover; cover re-imports it); viewer + editor resolve the brand display/body fonts and add --font-display + body fontFamily to lessonBrandVars; BlockRenderer HeadingRender dropped the literal font-display class for inline fontFamily: var(--font-display, ...). Whole-lesson-body adopts the brand body font, matching the cover. Assumes the brand fonts are loaded app-wide (same assumption the cover already makes). **CONFIRMED LIVE (carried in from Session 138):** scaffold-lesson-outline v26 ({overview, outcomes, outline}); TP-1 navy-hero cover + 13-circle spiral mark; TP-2 outcomes wired (editor LessonBlocksEditor itemQuery selects outcomes + LessonOutcomesPanel; viewer ContentItemViewer dedicated content-item-outcomes query merged onto the contentItem before the cover); a fresh replace-mode build of the test lesson (description + 5 outcomes + 42 blocks / 8 sections / 7 continue buttons / 5 interactive / 5 brand-bg blocks). **Edge fn versions: none changed this session (scaffold-lesson-outline v26 + expand-lesson-from-outline v27 carried from Session 138). No cron / RLS / schema changes; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.** **NEXT SESSION (Phase 2):** INT-1 (AI open-response feedback block + feedback edge fn, the differentiator), VIS-3 (hero imagery, reuse lesson-ingest-pexels-asset v2), VIS-6 (end-of-lesson recap). Phase 3 = INT-3 hotspot / INT-4 reveal / INT-5 sequence / INT-8 activation poll; Phase 4 = INT-2 personalization / INT-6 branching / INT-7 confidence. Standing carryforward: SCORM export + API setup; BQ-SUPERVISOR-DASH; Operations externalization arc; newsletter BUG-NWS-1 + Group H closure; newsletter STATIC_ROUTES manual-edit reminder; Doc-1 invoice live refund test; remaining VIS-4 (media-beside-text two-column, likely a new block type). NOTE: Sessions 137-138 did not leave numbered build-queue changelog entries (their work lives in the open-queue Session-137 banner + the session-137/138 handoffs), so this entry continues the integer sequence from v144. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v145 entry, architecture-reference v140, session-139-to-140.md.*

*v144 - Session 136 CLOSE. **AI lesson-builder image + batched-build session: the expand-lesson-from-outline windowing backend (v24), a NEW content-item-targeted Pexels ingest edge fn, and the two-part frontend (outline-stage image resolution + batched/windowed full-content build) all shipped and verified. Also: the "New Lesson" button shipped, a multi-track Learning-Experience + White-Label scope doc was written and loaded to the repo, and competitive recon + vendor decisions (AI video = Synthesia, VO = ElevenLabs) were locked. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold).** **EXPAND WINDOWING (backend, expand-lesson-from-outline v24, verify_jwt false preserved).** Added optional generate_start_index + generate_count; when both are sent the FULL outline is rendered as context but the model emits blocks ONLY for the window [start, start+count) and returns exactly that many, in order; absent => byte-identical v13 behavior (whole outline in one call). 9 surgical additive edits (interface, window compute + validation, outline GENERATE/context tagging, a windowed system-prompt directive, the "produce exactly N" rule, the closing user message, audit + response echo of generate_start_index/generate_count/windowed). Backward-compatible and dormant until the client sends windows. Solves the ~150s edge wall-clock + 8000-output-token cap on long outlines and is the foundation for per-batch VO/video later. Deployed as the full 4-file bundle (index + the 3 unchanged _shared modules), re-fetched + diff-verified, boot+auth probed (no-auth 401 missing_bearer_token, OPTIONS 204). **lesson-ingest-pexels-asset v1 (NEW edge fn, Track 1 image picker; verify_jwt true, super-admin gated).** Mirrors ingest-pexels-asset but targets a lesson content_item: body {content_item_id, pexels_id, src_large_url, photo_page_url, photographer_name, photographer_url, alt}; validates item_type='lesson'; calls request_asset_upload with p_content_item_id + p_ref_field='image_asset' then finalize_asset_upload; SSRF allowlist images.pexels.com; HEAD size(<=15MB)/mime guard; service-role upload; provenance to content_asset_versions.generation_provenance. newsletter-image-search reused VERBATIM for search (search-only, brand-agnostic; zero change). Image-block attribution is an additive optional FRONTEND-only string on the image block config (AI never emits it; renderer null-coalesces) so the AI edge functions were NOT touched (§61 satisfied). **FRONTEND (one comprehensive Lovable prompt; 4 files SHA-verified at HEAD).** types.ts (249017ec): OutlineItem gained image_query / image_resolved{asset_id,attribution,thumb_url} / image_skipped. Stage2Outline.tsx (1d2d6461): per-image-item resolution card (auto-searches newsletter-image-search once on mount; Use-this-image -> lesson-ingest-pexels-asset; Show-another; editable query; Leave-empty; Change-image) + approve gating (cannot approve while any image item is unresolved-and-not-skipped). AiPane.tsx (f7c505ef): handleApproveOutline resets full_content + runs the first window; buildNextBatch(startIndex) calls expand with the full outline + generate_start_index/generate_count, accumulates via functional update, and stitches each approved image (asset_id+attribution) onto its block by global outline index; batch size detailed 5 / standard 7 / concise 10. Stage3FullContent.tsx (b9490bc9): "Sections X of Y built" progress, "Build next N sections" button, finalize gated until all sections built. Client-driven batching (NOT server self-chain, per the generate-all-facets unreliability learning); accumulated state persists so a reload resumes mid-build. KNOWN COSMETIC: a freshly-ingested image may not preview in Stage 3 until the lesson is built (the canvas asset-URL map is populated on canvas load); the asset_id is correctly attached and renders post-build. **SCOPE + VENDORS.** BrainWise_Learning_Experience_and_WhiteLabel_Scope_v1.md written + loaded to the repo; build order tracks 1-6: (1) Pexels [DONE], (2) per-lesson branding + title card, (3) visual shell, (4) VO/ElevenLabs, (5) Synthesia video, (6) learner AI tutor. Vendor decisions: AI video = Synthesia (verify API moderation + SCORM/Enterprise caveats before building; Colossyan/HeyGen fallback); VO = ElevenLabs. Competitive recon delivered (Mindsmith closest analog). **NEXT SESSION (Cole-requested): finish the lesson-block work per BrainWise_Learning_Experience_and_WhiteLabel_Scope_v1.md, starting at track 2 (per-lesson branding + title card).** Carryforward (Cole live tests pending): Track 1 Pexels picker round-trip (pick -> ingest -> render -> save -> reload) + a long-lesson batched build. Carryforward (still open, from v143): SHA-verify the Shared/Teams ship; BQ-SUPERVISOR-DASH; AdminUsers UX prompt run+verify; backlog items 4, 5, 6, 7, 11; ai-chat v50/v51 repo commit (Cole, manual); BQ-PTP-PERFECT-VERIFY; newsletter STATIC_ROUTES manual-edit reminder; Doc-1 invoice live refund test; BUG-NWS-1; §82 facet_interpretations {public}-role nit; Operations Docs 3/4/5 backlog; white-label tracks; AI-chat grant-enforcement fix. Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v144 entry, architecture-reference v138, session-136-to-137.md.*

*v143 - Session 135 CLOSE. **Live-platform bug-fix + dashboard/feature-gating session: two production bugs fixed (new-org onboarding redirect loop; platform-wide assessment-take crash) plus one latent same-class fix, the dashboard_access feature-gate wired onto the company dashboards + interventions (frontend-only; backend already supported it), and the two corp "shared" pages combined behind a toggle + the Teams page hidden. One config function (has_required_demographics) hardened; no schema changes. No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; reinforces §117 GitHub-API-SHA frontend verification, apply_migration->execute_sql verify split, rolled-back-DO functional tests, and the global user_has_feature seam).** **BUG-ONBOARD-LOOP (fixed, verified).** New org admins/employees were trapped in an infinite redirect to /demographic-form. ROOT CAUSE: has_required_demographics required users.department_id + org_level for corporate roles, but those are invite/admin-assigned (not user-supplied) and legitimately null for a brand-new org with no departments or an unassigned invite, making the gate unsatisfiable; ProtectedRoute bounces hasRequired=false users that have an account_type to /demographic-form forever, before the onboarding_completed_at stamping step is ever reached. FIX (migration has_required_demographics_gate_user_fields_only): the gate now requires ONLY the three user-supplied demographic fields (role_in_org, industry, years_experience) for every non-exempt role (coach/super-admin still exempt; onboarding_completed_at short-circuit preserved); department_id/org_level no longer gate onboarding (enforce in the invite flow if ever needed). Forward-proofs every role. Verified via rolled-back DO (employee with null dept/org_level/onboarding_completed_at + the 3 fields -> gate true; both affected real users -> true). ROLLOUT: affected users just need a fresh page load (ProtectedRoute caches the gate result ~60s, refetchOnMount/Focus false). **BUG-ASSESS-310 (fixed, SHA-verified).** AssessmentFlow.tsx threw React #310 "rendered more hooks than during the previous render" because a useEffect (allAnswered -> setReviewingUnanswered) sat AFTER the if(needsAck) / if(loading||submitting) early returns, so when Phase-2 loading flipped false the questions render hit an extra hook. Platform-wide assessment-take outage since the Session-127 "Next Unanswered" work, NOT user-specific. FIX (Lovable): moved the allAnswered const + its useEffect above if(needsAck); the effect is a no-op until items load, so no behavior change. SHA e24766c4 -> 673a65dd. **BUG-ONBOARD-310 (latent, fixed, SHA-verified).** Onboarding.tsx had the same class (a useEffect + a <Navigate> after a spinner early return); moved the effect above all returns guarded by if(!user||accountTypeLoading||alreadyOnboarded)return, with the spinner + Navigate returns below the hooks. SHA e7dc1b38 -> 3c0a9a2f. **DASHBOARD_ACCESS GATING (shipped, SHA-verified).** Backend already supported it (NO change): org_has_feature(org,'dashboard_access') = (dashboard_access_level IS DISTINCT FROM 'none'); user_has_feature also checks member_feature_overrides(user,'dashboard_access') for a per-user off; super-admin always true. Frontend GAP closed: the company analytics routes were RoleGuard-only. App.tsx (SHA 1b8c008f) now wraps /company/nai-dashboard, /company/ptp-dashboard, /company/airsa-dashboard and /dashboard/interventions in <SubscriptionGate feature="dashboard_access"> INSIDE the existing RoleGuard (SubscriptionGate denies corporate users via toast + redirect to /dashboard; super-admins bypass). AppSidebar.tsx (SHA 9539dd2e) added hasDashboardAccess (supabase.rpc user_has_feature, keyed on [user] only, default false) AND'd into the Dashboards-submenu condition (showDashboardsMenu && hasAnyDashboard && hasDashboardAccess) and the Interventions condition. Personal /dashboard intentionally NOT gated (it is the SubscriptionGate denial redirect target; gating it would loop). The sidebar reads the flag once on mount, so a turn-off requires a reload to drop the nav. **SHARED COMBINE + TEAMS HIDE (shipped by Cole, visually confirmed; SHA-verify carryforward).** New src/pages/SharedHub.tsx = a toggle page (Corp Shared Results -> <SharedResults>; Generally Shared -> <SharedWithMe>) at /shared; corporateNav + adminNav replaced their two "Shared With Me"+"Shared Results" entries with one "Shared" -> /shared (individual/coach/super unchanged, still single "Shared With Me"); legacy /shared-results + /shared-with-me routes retained for those navs + bookmarks. Teams hidden: adminNav Teams entry removed + /admin/teams route -> <Navigate to="/dashboard"> + AdminTeams import removed (page file retained for the future build). **OPERATOR FINDING (durable, not a code bug).** The "Dashboard Access" control on CompanyDetail.tsx (super-admin Contract & Features tab) only writes dashboard_access_level_override when its "Override tier default" Switch is ON; with the switch off it sends null, and contract_upsert overwrites the column with whatever is sent on EVERY save, so the org falls back to its tier default (basic = dashboards on). To disable org-wide: switch ON + dropdown "None" + Save -> override 'none' -> org_has_feature false. Worth a later UX fix (single unambiguous Dashboards on/off toggle). **TEST DATA:** set the org-admin-2 test org (testclientbwe+orgadmin2 admin) dashboard_access_level_override='none' directly to exercise the gate; this REVERTS to null if its contract is re-saved with the override switch off. One other customer org was already genuinely 'none' (configured correctly earlier); BrainWise Test Corp stays 'basic' (on by design). The frontend gate is global, so every org that truly resolves to 'none' is now hidden. **BQ-SUPERVISOR-DASH (NEW, Cole-confirmed scope).** Supervisors should see the ACTUAL company dashboards (NAI/PTP/AIRSA), with the per-supervisor disable driven from the Members section of the org page (turns it off for all supervisors, leaves org_admin/company_admin on). GAP: the Dashboards submenu + Interventions render only for company_admin/org_admin/super_admin (showDashboardsMenu) and the routes' RoleGuard excludes corporate_employee, so supervisors don't see them at all today; the per-user dashboard_access override resolves correctly but has nothing supervisor-visible to hide. WORK: (a) extend company-dashboard nav + route visibility to supervisor corporate_employees (define supervisor = corporate_employee with >=1 direct report, via a hook/RPC); (b) keep the dashboard_access feature-gate so a per-supervisor member_feature_overrides('dashboard_access',enabled=false) hides it for that supervisor while admins stay on; (c) build the per-supervisor toggle in the Members section writing member_feature_overrides (the backend resolver already supports per-user dashboard_access). **NEXT SESSION (Cole-requested opener): backlog items 6 (SCORM export) + 7 (lesson-block tracking / external API set-up).** Carryforward (still open): SHA-verify the Shared/Teams ship (SharedHub.tsx + App.tsx + AppSidebar.tsx post-shared-prompt); BQ-SUPERVISOR-DASH; the v142 carryforwards (AdminUsers UX prompt run+verify; SHA-verify PublicInvoicePay/OperationsSettings/CompanyMembersSection/AdminUsers; optional org-admin CRM&Ops action gating; CRM/OPERATIONS route gating + customer-access/externalization arc; module subscription billing; per-tenant Stripe Connect; per-org From-domain + /pay header; item 4 support chatbot; content-authoring restructure; ai-chat v50/v51 repo commit [Cole, manual]; BQ-PTP-PERFECT-VERIFY; newsletter STATIC_ROUTES manual-edit reminder; Doc-1 invoice live refund test; BUG-NWS-1; §82 facet_interpretations {public}-role nit; Operations Docs 3/4/5 backlog). Close artifacts (markdown only, Session-74): this v143 entry, architecture-reference v137, session-135-to-136.md.*

*v142 - Session 134 CLOSE. **Operations/CRM externalization-track session: (1) per-org branding of the Operations invoice email and (2) granting CRM/Operations workspace access to existing platform members from both the super-admin and org-admin surfaces, both built backend-first and verified; plus a lesson-assets storage-scanner false-positive disposition. No SaaS-platform feature work.** No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; reinforces apply_migration->execute_sql verify split, CREATE OR REPLACE same-signature preserves ACL vs DROP+CREATE resets it, multi-statement execute_sql returns only the last result, rolled-back-DO functional tests with JWT-sim, §156/§157 grant discipline, §117 GitHub-API-SHA frontend verification, and never-touch-platform-stripe-webhook). **FEATURE 1 - PER-ORG INVOICE-EMAIL BRANDING (backend COMPLETE + verified; frontend mostly shipped).** RESEND CONSTRAINT (locked): Resend can only send from a DNS-verified domain, so a per-tenant arbitrary From address is not possible; the solution keeps the shared sending mailbox invoices@mail.brainwiseenterprises.com for EVERY org and varies only the From DISPLAY NAME + reply_to, plus body brand colors/logo. operations.organizations += sender_display_name text, reply_to_email text, email_logo_enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false; BrainWise backfilled sender_display_name='BrainWise'. New RPC public.ops_get_org_email_branding(p_org uuid) SECDEF, service_role only (REVOKE PUBLIC,anon; GRANT service_role) - returns name/sender_display_name/reply_to_email/legal_name/logo_url/brand_color/accent_color/email_logo_enabled + stripe_collection_enabled. ops_update_org_branding(p_patch jsonb) extended (SAME signature, no overload, ACL preserved) to accept the three new fields. ops_get_public_document_by_token invoice branch extended to also return collects_payment = COALESCE(org.stripe_collection_enabled,false). Edge fn ops-invoice-send v13 -> v14 (verify_jwt true, 401 boot-verified): senderName=COALESCE(sender_display_name,name,'BrainWise'), brandColor/accentColor from the org, footerName=COALESCE(legal_name,name), logo embedded only when email_logo_enabled, reply_to attached only when set, CTA label 'View & Pay Invoice' when stripe_collection_enabled else 'View Invoice', From mailbox unchanged for all orgs, fromDisplayName() sanitizer. VERIFIED byte-identical to the original for BrainWise across permutations (branding is purely additive for the one org that had no overrides). Attachments (invoice PDF + billable expense receipts) already attach for ANY org (request-param driven, attachment_path validated to start with the invoice's own org_id, receipts via org-scoped ops_get_invoice_expense_receipts) - no BrainWise-only branch existed. STRIPE DECISION (locked): only BrainWise has stripe_collection_enabled=true; one STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (BrainWise's), no Stripe Connect, so all ops invoice payments settle to BrainWise today; ops-public-invoice-checkout (v10, verify_jwt false) gates on ops_stripe_collection_enabled(org) -> 403 if disabled; every Stripe session/customer/PaymentIntent is tagged ops_org_id metadata so Connect slots in later. Per-tenant collection (Stripe Connect) DEFERRED to the externalization arc; per-org custom From-domain and the /pay/:token public page header literal 'BrainWise' also DEFERRED (externalization-branding). FRONTEND: OperationsSettings.tsx Branding tab (the 3 new fields + an 'Invoice email' UI block) RUN/confirmed by Cole; PublicInvoicePay.tsx canPay gate now also requires invoice.collects_payment===true (const canPay = invoice.collects_payment === true && balanceDue > 0 && !PAID_TERMINAL.has(status)) - GIVEN, SHA-UNCONFIRMED (verify Session 135). **FEATURE 2 - GRANT CRM/OPERATIONS WORKSPACE ACCESS (backend COMPLETE + verified; frontend shipped).** Ops 'access' = an active row in operations.users (PK id = auth uid; org_id, email, full_name, role operations.user_role admin|sales_manager|sales_user|read_only, status, manager_id); this is SEPARATE from the module nav, which is gated by user_has_feature(module:CRM/OPERATIONS) + useOpsMembership(). operations.organizations += nullable platform_org_id uuid + partial unique index organizations_platform_org_id_key WHERE platform_org_id IS NOT NULL (plain uuid, NO cross-schema FK per Doc-5 Rule 1) = the platform-org -> ops-workspace link. ops_provision_customer_org recreated as the 6-arg form (added p_platform_org_id uuid DEFAULT NULL) and then patched (migration ops_provision_autolink_platform_org) to AUTO-DERIVE platform_org_id from the provisioning admin's public.users.organization_id when p_platform_org_id IS NULL, gated to admin account_type IN ('org_admin','company_admin') (coach/individual user-mode workspaces stay unlinked; collision guard); single signature, grants intact. Four new SECDEF RPCs (REVOKE PUBLIC,anon + GRANT authenticated,service_role): ops_grant_operations_access(p_user_id uuid, p_role operations.user_role, p_platform_org_id uuid DEFAULT NULL) [super-admin path when p_platform_org_id set -> assert_super_admin + resolve the ops org via platform_org_id; else org-admin path -> operations.current_org_id() + require current_user_role()='admin'; ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE; guards: target has an auth account, one-org-per-user, and (migration ops_grant_guard_last_admin_demotion) refuse demoting the ONLY active admin to a lesser role]; ops_revoke_operations_access(p_user_id, p_platform_org_id DEFAULT NULL) [status='inactive'; refuses leaving zero active admins]; ops_org_user_admin_list(p_platform_org_id uuid) [super-admin read, json array, [] when no workspace]; ops_org_user_list() [org-admin read, current_org_id + admin role]. Functional tests (rolled-back DO, JWT-sim): grant -> role-change -> revoke -> last-admin-revoke guard, and the sole-admin demotion guard, both pass with zero residue. BUG FOUND + FIXED in-session (migration backfill_ops_platform_org_id): the super-admin Members drawer for BrainWise Test Corp showed 'no operations workspace provisioned' because that workspace predated platform_org_id (link NULL); backfilled platform_org_id for existing org-mode ops workspaces from each admin's public.users.organization_id, guarded to org_admin/company_admin admins, so ONLY BrainWise Test Corp linked to its platform org while the BrainWise production workspace and the Test Coach workspace stay NULL (super-admin/coach admins have no corporate platform org). Verified ops_org_user_admin_list for Test Corp returns its admin. ENTITLEMENT MODEL re-confirmed (answers the buy-CRM-or-Operations-or-both question, no code needed): module:CRM and module:OPERATIONS resolve INDEPENDENTLY via principal_has_module -> module_entitlements with module_definitions defaults (both default-off); an ops seat is separate from the module entitlement; the sidebar adds crmNav/operationsNav per module; BrainWise Test Corp's platform org holds explicit org-level grants for BOTH. FRONTEND: CompanyMembersSection.tsx (super-admin Members drawer Sheet) RUN; AdminUsers.tsx (org-admin Users tab drawer Sheet) RUN + confirmed working. UX PROMPT GIVEN this session (NOT yet run): AdminUsers.tsx - (a) gate the 'Executive Perspective NAI' tab (TabsTrigger + TabsContent) on useOrgInstrumentAccess().orgInstrumentIncluded(DASHBOARD_INSTRUMENT_UUIDS.NAI); (b) collapse the per-row active-actions buttons into a single kebab DropdownMenu to kill horizontal scroll (leave the isSelf/graceExpired and inGrace branches unchanged). **SECURITY REVIEW - lesson-assets bucket scanner warning = FALSE POSITIVE, no change.** The Lovable scanner flagged that the private lesson-assets bucket has no trainee storage SELECT policy. Investigated and dispositioned: the bucket is private; trainee delivery is fully RPC-gated (useLessonBlockAssets -> edge fn get-lesson-block-asset-urls v11, verify_jwt false, JWT-in-body -> RPC get_lesson_block_assets_for_trainee SECDEF, which enforces LMS module entitlement + self/super-admin/mentor + content_item is a published non-archived lesson + an active/completed user_curriculum_assignments row on a curriculum whose curriculum_modules contains the parent module, THEN service_role signs with a 2h expiry). Do NOT add a trainee storage SELECT policy: it is redundant (signed-URL fetches are not governed by RLS), it would open a direct authenticated read path that bypasses the single RPC authorization checkpoint (the SCORM/export seam; viewers are forbidden from touching supabase.storage), and the private bucket has no guessable URLs. Recorded in architecture-reference v136. **Edge fn versions: ops-invoice-send v14 NEW; no others changed. No cron changes. ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.** Carryforward (still open): run+verify the AdminUsers UX prompt; SHA-verify PublicInvoicePay.tsx + OperationsSettings.tsx + CompanyMembersSection.tsx + AdminUsers.tsx; optional hardening = gate the org-admin 'CRM & Ops' action on the org holding >=1 of CRM/OPERATIONS; plus the standing v141 carryforwards (CRM/OPERATIONS route gating + the broader customer-access/externalization arc; module subscription billing wiring; per-tenant Stripe Connect; per-org From-domain + /pay header branding; items 4/6/7; content-authoring restructure / content-item viewer; ai-chat v50/v51 repo commit [Cole, manual]; BQ-PTP-PERFECT-VERIFY; newsletter STATIC_ROUTES manual-edit reminder; Doc-1 invoice live refund test; BUG-NWS-1; §82 facet_interpretations {public}-role nit; Operations Docs 3/4/5 backlog). *v141 - Session 133 CLOSE (module-entitlement build; continues the v140 white-label/scoping half of Session 133). **Module Entitlement layer ("modularize and sell") Phase 1 built end-to-end and verified: per-principal on/off for platform modules across corporate orgs, individuals, and coaches, resolved by one function; backend spine + LMS and ASSESSMENTS enforcement (frontend routes + backend RPCs) + the super-admin control surface, all shipped. No Operations work.** No new numbered standing rule (§1-§158 hold; reinforces the apply_migration->execute_sql verify split, rolled-back-DO functional tests with JWT-sim, §156/§157 grant discipline, §117 GitHub-API-SHA frontend verification, and the super_admin_action_types FK-registration-before-logging requirement). **JUDGMENT CALL (Cole-approved): company module grants live as org-principal rows in module_entitlements, turned on by us when a contract is invoiced; NO columns added to corporate_contracts** - the scope doc's org-keyed-column recommendation was rejected because columns on corporate_contracts can express only the company path and cannot entitle coaches or individuals who have no contract row, and Cole's direction (individuals get a future subscription plus manual invoice turn-on now; coaches get manual invoice turn-on now plus possible subscription later; companies stay contract/invoice) forces one principal-keyed store. **BACKEND SPINE (public schema; all verified via rolled-back DO-block suites, zero residue).** module_definitions(module PK, label, default_enabled, is_sellable, is_enforced); seeds LMS + ASSESSMENTS default_enabled=true/is_enforced=true, CRM + OPERATIONS default_enabled=false/is_enforced=false, all is_sellable=true (is_enforced = "this layer actually controls access for the module today"). module_entitlements(id, principal_type CHECK user|org, user_id XOR org_id [FK users/organizations ON DELETE CASCADE, XOR CHECK], module FK, source, source_ref, granted_by, starts_at, ends_at, revoked_at, effect CHECK grant|deny, created_at, updated_at); indexes uq_module_ent_source_ref UNIQUE(source,source_ref,module) WHERE source_ref NOT NULL (purchase/webhook idempotency) + uq_module_ent_active_user / uq_module_ent_active_org partial-unique per principal+module WHERE revoked_at IS NULL. module_subscription_prices(stripe_price_id PK, module FK, grant_kind default 'subscription'); EMPTY - subscription-readiness only (the webhook reads it, so adding a price + mapping it makes individual/coach subscription grants work with zero code change). **RESOLVER + SEAM.** principal_has_module(p_user,p_module) (SECDEF STABLE, service_role-only EXEC): super-admin -> true; most-specific active explicit override wins (user grant/deny beats org grant/deny; active = revoked_at IS NULL AND starts_at<=now() AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at>now())); else module_definitions.default_enabled; else false. user_has_feature intercepts feature LIKE 'module:%' at the top and returns principal_has_module(user, module-name); all prior non-module behavior preserved, one seam inherited by SubscriptionGate and any RPC/RLS. **WRITE PATH / RPCs.** _module_entitlement_upsert(principal_type,user_id,org_id,module,source,source_ref,granted_by,ends_at,effect) (SECDEF, service_role-only): idempotent on (source,source_ref,module) when source_ref set, else upserts the single active principal+module row flipping effect. module_entitlement_grant / _deny / _revoke (super-admin; EXEC authenticated+service_role): each assert_super_admin + assert_impersonation_allows('permission_change') + reason>=10 + audit via log_super_admin_action; grant->effect grant (default source manual_invoice), deny->effect deny (source manual_deny), revoke->sets revoked_at (clears to module default). module_entitlement_admin_list(principal_type,user_id,org_id) (SECDEF, super-admin): per sellable module returns default_enabled, is_enforced, override_effect, override_source, override_ends_at, effective_enabled (powers the admin toggles). assert_module_entitled(p_module): reusable backend deny primitive, raises authentication_required or module_not_entitled (ERRCODE 42501). **AUDIT.** Action types module_entitlement_grant / _deny / _revoke registered in super_admin_action_types (category user_management, requires_justification, is_mutation, denylist_during_impersonation); super_admin_audit_log.action_type FK-references super_admin_action_types, so any new logged type must be registered first or the logging RPC fails (caught + fixed in-session). **ENFORCEMENT (default-on, real per-principal off-switch at both layers).** LMS backend (7 RPCs): caller=consumer on get_content_item_video_playback, get_resource_content_asset, self_enroll_in_module, self_enroll_in_curriculum, self_enroll_in_certification_path; target-based (gate on the target learner via principal_has_module(v_target_id,'LMS')) on get_content_item_video_asset, get_lesson_block_assets_for_trainee. LMS frontend (7 learner routes wrapped in SubscriptionGate feature="module:LMS"): /resources, /my-learning, /resources/:resourceId, /learning/cert-path/:certPathId, /learning/curriculum/:curriculumId, /learning/module/:moduleId, /learning/content-item/:contentItemId (the /coach/resources, /coach/certification, /admin/resources, /super-admin/* routes deliberately untouched). ASSESSMENTS = coarse module switch ABOVE the existing per-instrument entitlements (instruments unchanged): backend start_assessment (jsonb error module_not_entitled) + start_epn_assessment (raise), begin-chokepoint only (in-progress + results untouched); frontend 3 take-routes wrapped in SubscriptionGate feature="module:ASSESSMENTS" (/assessment, /epn-complete/:assignmentId, /airsa-manager-complete/:managerAssessmentId). SubscriptionGate was extended so module:* features route through user_has_feature for EVERY principal before the bypass shortcut (so coaches can be gated and super-admins pass via the resolver); the individual branch previously gated purely on Stripe subscription_status and ignored feature - recon confirmed the LMS learner routes were NOT previously wrapped, so default-on matches today's open-to-authenticated reality and naive wiring would have changed individual access. **ADMIN SURFACE.** ModuleEntitlementsPanel (Default / On / Off + reason) on CompanyDetail "Modules" tab (org principal) and the member Access tab (individuals + coaches), driven by module_entitlement_admin_list + the grant/deny/revoke RPCs. **DELIBERATELY DEFERRED THIS SESSION.** assert_module_entitled('LMS') is tested and ready but NOT yet wired onto the learner content RPCs (with LMS default-on it would be a pure no-op today; retrofitting the full learner read surface now is regression risk for zero current effect - attach when LMS flips to gated, at get_module_detail + the learner content/resource entry RPCs + the signed-URL edge functions get-content-item-video-url / get-resource-signed-url). Module subscription billing: module_subscription_prices is empty, so the ~15-line stripe-webhook branch that reads it and calls _module_entitlement_upsert (idempotent on subscription id) is deferred until module prices are defined and can be boot-verified against a real mapped price (modifying the money-path webhook for an inert feature is the wrong risk trade now). CRM + OPERATIONS route gating: dormant (super-admin-only today, ~40 /operations routes, no shared layout wrapper) - attach during the customer-access build, not before. **Verified the three ASSESSMENTS take-routes landed via GitHub get_commit full_patch (exactly three routes wrapped, three lines changed, nothing else). No edge functions / cron / Operations changes this session; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.** Carryforward (still open): CRM/OPERATIONS route gating + the CRM/Operations customer-access project (tenant-scoped RLS across operations.* under many org_ids, non-super-admin routing + onboarding/provisioning, per-tenant UI scoping, module billing); module subscription billing wiring; optional cosmetic - hide dashboard instrument-selection tiles when ASSESSMENTS is off; items 4 (in-system support chatbot), 6 (SCORM export), 7 (lesson-block tracking API) untouched; content-authoring restructure / content-item viewer; ai-chat v50/v51 repo commit (Cole, manual); BQ-PTP-PERFECT-VERIFY; newsletter STATIC_ROUTES manual-edit reminder; Doc-1 invoice live refund test; BUG-NWS-1; §82 facet_interpretations {public}-role nit; Operations Docs 3/4/5 backlog. Custom CSS DEFERRED (XSS). Frontend (Lovable, SHA-verified): OrgBrandingInjector.tsx (headless; converts org hex->shadcn HSL "H S% L%", overrides --primary/--accent + sidebar/ring vars on :root with WCAG-luminance foreground pick, clears on logout/default/unmount), mounted first child of ImpersonationProvider in App.tsx; CompanyBrandingSection.tsx + Branding tab in CompanyDetail.tsx; AppLayout.tsx header swapped fixed navy for hsl(var(--primary)) + org logo/name. RESOLVER FACT: 5.1 brand resolves from the AUTH'd user's organization_id. **5.3 TENANT ISOLATION (designed + fixed + audited, CLOSED; design doc whitelabel-5_3-tenant-isolation-design.md).** CORRECTED MODEL: users.organization_id IS the tenant key and RLS already enforces it via current_user_org_id() (= SELECT organization_id FROM users WHERE id=auth.uid()); the Session-128 "no uniform tenant key, retrofit everything" framing was WRONG. RLS is on for every public base table; the org-admin read on the PII surface (assessments, assessment_results [+permissions.viewer_organization_id], users, ai_usage_counters, member_feature_overrides, company_admin_audit_log, corporate_*, org_* narratives/interventions/history, executive_perspective_assignments) is uniformly current_user_org_id-bounded = clean. ONE gap fixed: migration whitelabel_5_3_bound_teams_team_members_to_org ALTERed the teams ALL policy + the 3 team_members write policies so the company_admin/org_admin branch requires organization_id=current_user_org_id() (the team's org for team_members), preserving super-admin (cross-org) + team-manager (own teams) branches; rolled-back RLS functional test as a real Test Corp company_admin passed every axis (cross-org update/delete=0 rows, cross-org insert DENIED by WITH CHECK, own update=1, own insert OK, team_members own visible / cross not). Step-2 read-only audit CLEAN: all 4 member-exposing views (admin_org_users_view, coach_clients_client_view, org_users_public, organization_features_view) are security_invoker=true (inherit RLS); every org-param SECDEF reader/mutation self-bounds inline (admin role + super-admin-or-v_caller_org=p_organization_id) - verified get_nai_epn_delta, get_ptp_leader_workforce_delta (both 5-participant suppression floor), assign_executive_perspective_assessment (also rejects out-of-org assignees), org_set_mfa_required, reconcile_supervisors_for_org; core member INSERT with_check is owner-bound (assessments user_id=auth.uid(); assessment_responses via an owned in_progress assessment; chat_sessions; resource_access_log) and the other member tables have NO authenticated INSERT path (RPC/service-role). Optional tidy-ups (NOT leaks): revoke EXECUTE from authenticated/anon on log_super_admin_action, seat_count_*, org_has_feature. Step-3 (org_id attribution-stamping for stable seat/attempt accounting) DEFERRED into items 6/7 by design (users.organization_id is a MOVING pointer; stamp org_id at launch/attempt write-time for stable attribution; do NOT mass-retrofit/RLS-partition the learning tables - access control already works). **5.4 CUSTOM DOMAINS (backend + frontend shipped + verified).** Lovable hosting answer: multiple custom/vanity domains per project YES (paid plan, manual per-domain dashboard entry + DNS A 185.158.133.1/CNAME + _lovable TXT, auto-TLS, NO bulk/API); wildcard subdomains NO (each separate manual entry+cert); request hostname preserved so client-side window.location.hostname tenant resolution is viable (no server-side per-host routing); SPA deep-link history-rewrite built-in (BrowserRouter). So per-org AUTO-subdomains need an external proxy (Cloudflare-for-SaaS / CloudFront+ACM) at scale; vanity domains buildable now (manual, tractable at tens). Migration whitelabel_5_4_org_custom_domains: table org_custom_domains (organization_id FK CASCADE, hostname unique on lower(hostname), kind subdomain/vanity, is_verified, is_primary, created_by, timestamps; index on organization_id); RLS service_role ALL + super-admin manage + org-admins read own (current_user_org_id bound); REVOKE ALL FROM anon on the table. PRE-AUTH resolver RPC get_org_branding_for_hostname(p_hostname) (SQL STABLE SECDEF; normalizes lower + strip-port via split_part ':'; matches a VERIFIED domain; returns the same brand shape as get_org_branding_for_current_user; REVOKE FROM PUBLIC then GRANT anon+authenticated+service_role - anon REQUIRED so a vanity domain is branded BEFORE login). Super-admin RPCs admin_set_org_custom_domain(p_organization_id,p_hostname,p_kind,p_is_verified,p_is_primary,p_reason) (upsert ON CONFLICT lower(hostname), single-primary-per-org enforced in-RPC, assert_super_admin + reason>=10 + audit) and admin_remove_org_custom_domain(p_hostname,p_reason); action_types org_custom_domain_set + org_custom_domain_removed; both admin RPCs REVOKE PUBLIC,anon + GRANT authenticated,service_role. Rolled-back functional test passed all axes (super-admin set verified+primary; anon resolve of 'Acme.Example.Test:443' -> is_default=false org A, proving case+port normalization; unknown + unverified host -> is_default=true; org-A admin sees own 2 / 0 of org B; remove returns row; re-resolve removed -> is_default=true). Frontend (Lovable, SHA-verified): OrgBrandingInjector.tsx (SHA 7b27bec9) no-user branch now resolves brand by window.location.hostname pre-auth (auth'd path unchanged); new CompanyDomainsSection.tsx (SHA 2492bfd1) + Domains tab in CompanyDetail.tsx (SHA 57a4be98), add/verify/primary/remove via the admin RPCs with manual-DNS/Lovable + no-wildcard helper text. DESIGN NOTE: 5.4 brand resolves from HOSTNAME pre-auth (anonymous), a different resolver shape from the auth'd 5.1 path. **MODULARIZE + SELL (scoped, NOT built; scope doc module-entitlement-scope.md).** Cole wants to sell modules (Assessments, LMS, CRM, Operations) bundled or a la carte (LMS without assessments and vice versa). GAP: no module concept for LMS/CRM/Operations. Assessments already sellable (instrument granularity). LMS = a flag + gating + a catalog-ownership decision (resell BrainWise catalog [easy] vs per-org authored/imported [big, ties to SCORM item 6]). CRM+Operations = super-admin-only internal back-office in operations.* (org-partitioned but single-tenant-built, no operations.users membership, UI super_admin-gated) -> selling externally = LARGE arc (operations.* multi-tenant membership/roles + UI de-gate + full operations.* isolation audit [NEW surface beyond 5.3] + entitlement). Phasing: Phase 1 public-schema module flags + gating; Phase 2 per-org LMS catalog (with SCORM item 6); Phase 3 CRM/Ops externalization. NEXT SESSION = module Phase 1 + scope/start Phase 2/3. **No edge functions changed this session; no cron / no Operations / no RLS-beyond-the-above; ops-stripe-webhook / platform stripe-webhook never touched.
